tickets.subject: Your profile is handpicked for Software Development Masters Program
AI Search and the Law of Shitty Click-Throughs

thread.body:
AI Native

By Pepper Content


By Pepper Content

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-search-law-shitty-click-throughs-peppercontent-eushe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BCg%2FKKG0WSgq5B2INqbk4xw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2pPSfolWohcHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me0fd82t~47-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me0fd82t-47&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjU4ZGNhZDA0MjlmYWE4ZjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmI0NTVlYWZlYzA3YzliZTA2MTg5YmZlMmNlYjM4MDMzYmY3ZTIxN2MzNGI5NzFlZSwxLDE%3D
  
This is the LinkedIn edition of AI Native, the newsletter for marketers who want to win the AI Age. Subscribe on Substack to get cutting-edge strategies, AI Search insights, and top marketing trends in your inbox. Welcome to AI Native — the newsletter for marketers who want to dominate AI Search, supercharge their creativity, and build AI-Native teams. Wait, didn’t this newsletter used to be called Co-Creative? Yes! We rebranded it because we’re marketers and can’t go three months without rebranding something. It fills the empty space in our souls. But there was also a practical reason: The focus of this newsletter is changing because marketing is changing. Whenever I’ve talked to marketing leaders over the past few months, they’ve all said some version of the same thing: They’re under immense pressure to build savvy, AI-native marketing teams, but there’s no blueprint. AI Search is a black box, getting ChatGPT Enterprise past procurement is a living hell, and they have no idea how their team is using AI today. If that sounds familiar, this newsletter is for you. I’m Joe Lazer, fractional CMO at Pepper. I spent eight years building Contently, wrote a best-selling book called The Storytelling Edge, and currently write a popular Substack newsletter about content strategy and business storytelling. This newsletter is my excuse to nerd out on AI and marketing. Each week, Pepper Managing Editor Steph Walden and I will bring you the latest and greatest insights on how to win the AI Age — starting with a deep focus on AI Search. Why AI Search Is a Generational Opportunity for CMOs Why AI Search? (Or, take your pick of acronym: GEO, LLMO, AIO, EIEIO.) Because if I’ve learned one thing as a CMO, it’s that the Law of Shitty Click-Through Rates reigns supreme. The Law of Shitty Click-Throughs says that the effectiveness of every marketing channel or tactic declines over time. The longer you wait to adopt a new channel, the harder it becomes to break through. The first banner ad had a click-through rate of 78%. Today, the average banner CTR hovers at 0.1% — and most of those clicks are accidental. The same thing has happened with email marketing, Facebook ads, LinkedIn ads, PR, webinars, e-books, TikTok… you name it. All of these channels and tactics worked brilliantly for early movers, but have delivered diminishing returns over time. By the time a marketing best practice is a best practice, it doesn’t really work anymore. But if you get in early? That’s where the magic happens. If you got in early on content marketing and newsletters, you have a powerful organic engine. If you got in early on TikTok, you have a huge advantage over your competitors. If you got in early on content marketing and SEO, you’re printing money. We only get a truly high-upside new channel once every “marketing generation,” which I’d define as every 4-7 years. A few past examples: 2007: Social (when Facebook first invited brands into the fold) 2011: Content marketing for B2B (when social started driving traffic and Google’s Panda algorithm started rewarding high-quality content) 2012: Mobile for B2C (when smartphone ownership hit 50% and Instagram took off) 2018: When TikTok first gained traction in the US It’s been seven years, and we now have another generational opportunity: AI Search. In May, Google rolled out AI Mode to all users in the US, providing a ChatGPT-like experience for search queries. It’s now on Google’s homepage. Sometime in the next year, they’re likely going to make it the default search experience for all users. Since Google owns 90% of the search market, that will change marketing overnight. Combine that with ChatGPT’s fast-climbing adoption, and marketers have an opportunity unlike anything I’ve seen in my 15 years in the industry. If you can master AI Search and make your brand a top recommendation of LLMs, you will have a ridiculously unfair advantage over your competition. The only logical move is to go all-in and crack it first. Luckily, Pepper has long been an SEO wizard, driving massive traffic gains for enterprise brands. We’ve been building GenAI products since before ChatGPT exploded onto the scene. That expertise has translated well, and our team has been hard at work in the lab decoding the AI Search algorithms. We’re literally discovering new tactics every day. For a quick primer, grab our latest guide here, and stay tuned for more insights each week. NEW AND NOTEWORTHY The AI news cycle moves fast. We curate the chaos so you don’t have to. Here are the top stories on our radar this week: News publications are in an existential crisis after an analysis found that CTRs are dropping up to 80% for stories that appear below an AI overview. Google is beta testing Web Guide, a new AI Search feature that organizes results into topic-based clusters instead of that classic list of blue links. One in four users now prefer ChatGPT to Google for search, according to a new Adobe study — with young people leading the charge away from the search giant that raised them. Still, Google is performing better than expected against ChatGPT, with its new AI features driving up search volume and usage. First-mover advantage FTW. Over 100 million people are reportedly using Google's AI Mode, another indicator that the search titan will not go gentle into that good night. Its ad revenue also looks strong, with better-than-expected Q2 earnings suggesting reports of Google's advertising death are exaggerated. ChatGPT 5.0 release rumors are swirling, with murmurs that OpenAI's next flagship model could drop in August. Anthropic uncovered possible "subliminal learning" capabilities in large language models, suggesting AI might be learning new skills without explicit training. Google launched Opal, a vibe-coding tool that lets developers create mini applications by describing what they want rather than coding from scratch. AI SEARCH DECODED AI Summaries Are Cannibalizing Clicks The Pew Research Center delivered what may be the most comprehensive look yet at how AI summaries are reshaping search behavior. Their study of nearly 69,000 Google searches found that users click on website links just 8% of the time when AI summaries appear, compared to 15% for traditional search results. Even more telling, only 1% of users actually clicked on the source citations within those AI summaries, meaning the websites providing the information that powers these summaries see almost no traffic benefit. The data also revealed that users are 63% more likely to end their browsing session entirely when they encounter an AI summary. Google, unsurprisingly, is having none of it. The company dismissed the research as using "a flawed methodology and skewed query-set that is not representative of Search traffic," while insisting they haven't seen the traffic drops the study purports. Google's defense centers on the idea that AI features create "new opportunities for people to connect with websites,” though they're notably light on specifics about what those opportunities look like. MEME OF THE WEEK This is the LinkedIn edition of AI Native, the newsletter for marketers who want to win the AI Age. Subscribe on Substack to follow along with the latest AI Search insights and strategies.
Keep reading on LinkedIn

tickets.subject: Why Your Hiring Strategy Isn’t Working (And How to Fix It)

thread.body:
Hacking HR

By Hacking HR


By Hacking HR

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-your-hiring-strategy-isnt-working-how-fix-hacking-hr-y8orc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BQnHmJm9sTTKFF%2Fr%2FpQYn9g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=065gZYmC5ucrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me08xqoy~dp-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me08xqoy-dp&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjQ4ZWM4ZDY0NjlhYWQ4OTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmUzMTNiN2RhZDAwZWExYTNjM2Q5ZWM5NGU1OGM2ZWY1ZjRhNDg1YzBjMDcwZTdmNCwxLDE%3D
  
“I created two résumés, deliberately built for the role, and applied. Boom. Both got rejected. I’m the hiring manager.” “The hiring process is broken”; ironically, the growing chorus of voices includes the people directly involved in building the system (recruiters, hiring managers, and candidates alike) who say it can’t be trusted. Labor market activity picked up in June, with U.S. employers adding 74,000 new sales roles. Companies nearly doubled their spending on job ads and outreach campaigns compared to last year. But growth has brought volatility: 34% of companies expect layoffs in the next quarter, and hiring freezes are increasing across several sectors. While the labor market remains active, confidence in hiring decisions remains low.  Budgets are shrinking. Roles open and close unpredictably. Newly hired employees are let go within months. And many times, the underlying issue is not underperformance. Why Hiring is Broken There are some tangible signs of a system that is working against itself, in a recurring cycle of mismatched expectations, rework, wasted resources, and delays. Candidates ghosted after six rounds of interviews Roles posted, filled, then eliminated Recruiters sourcing without clear direction Hiring managers filter out candidates when the criteria shift mid-process. Is the problem how we hire? Or is it a lack of clarity in how we define what’s needed, when, and why? 5 Reasons Why Hiring Strategies Fail Gartner conducted a survey and found that more than 6 in 10 leaders have undergone a major structural change in their recruiting function in the last few years. However, 2 in 10 recognize that the recruiting processes have not become more efficient. So the problem starts upstream, long before the job post goes live. Unclear Hiring Strategy: Talent acquisition often operates on demand: a role opens, a requisition is approved, recruiters get to work. But without visibility into strategic priorities, this process is reactive at best. Most HR functions still lack the infrastructure and data to conduct true strategic workforce planning. So, hiring decisions are made in silos. Recruiters move fast to fill requests. Business leaders expect talent pipelines to be flexible and responsive. But without shared planning frameworks, the system can’t deliver either. One quarter, teams ramp up quickly. The next roles are paused or eliminated. Misaligned Hiring Teams: Recruiters and hiring managers often work toward different goals. Recruiters are measured on speed and volume. Hiring managers prioritize the perfect fit, and most of them don’t follow an agreed-upon process. If recruiters don’t have clear updates on business needs, the best sourcing efforts add no real value (and the cycle will repeat with each new role). Poor Candidate Experience: Most hiring journeys are still designed around employer convenience. If the process is delayed, communication is inconsistent, and candidates are not informed about the next steps…don’t expect them to be engaged. The best talent never waits long. When hiring timelines stretch, drop-off rates rise, and candidates will likely accept offers elsewhere.  Ineffective Hiring Tech: While AI and automation are increasingly used in recruitment, most organizations lack a clear framework to apply them. Adding tools to solve specific symptoms, like resume volume, will not fix poor planning or misaligned criteria. Inconsistent EVP Messaging: Candidates expect consistency between what a company says and what it shows. An organization may emphasize culture, belonging, and purpose as part of its EVP. But if the process is slow, job posts are confusing, and candidates get no feedback, the disconnect will be apparent. And the company’s reputation and reach will feel the impact. The Hidden Costs of a Broken Hiring Strategy Wasted Spend on Misfires: According to CareerBuilder, 75% of employers said they had hired the wrong person for a position, and the average cost of a bad hire was nearly $17,000. (plus lost productivity, time, and resources spent on recruitment and onboarding) Long Hiring Cycles Drain Time and Budget: The average time-to-fill is 52 days, delaying business goals, increasing team workload, and driving candidate drop-off rates (Source: Indeed) Soft Costs Inflate Actual Hiring Price: The average cost per hire is $4,700 in hard costs—but 60% of the real cost comes from soft expenses like onboarding time, training, and productivity lag. That brings total costs closer to $10,000–$15,000 per hire (Indeed) Turnover before ROI: Nearly 75% of employees leave a company before receiving a promotion. And among those who stay, fewer than 1% are promoted by their third year (ADP). Poor Candidate Experience Damages Brand: 40% of unemployed job seekers in 2024 didn’t land a single interview, even after dozens of applications. Many drop out due to excessive interviews, no feedback, or unpaid assignments, and share their poor experience publicly, harming the employer's brand and the likelihood of attracting talent. Navigating the GenAI Disillusionment Curve While business leaders expect a 22.6% improvement in functional productivity from GenAI over the next 12–18 months, implementation remains a challenge. According to Gartner, most functions—including HR—are approaching the “Trough of Disillusionment” on the Hype Cycle. The promise of AI is high, but so are the barriers: Data Quality Issues Uncertainty Around Best Practices Employee Skills Gaps Change Fatigue Recruiting teams may be tempted to lean heavily on automation to fix broken hiring processes. But without the right foundations—skills, data infrastructure, and governance—GenAI could amplify inefficiencies rather than solve them. Five Steps for a Smarter, Stronger Hiring Strategy When hiring doesn’t work, it’s rarely just one issue. More often, it’s because recruiting, workforce planning, and team decisions aren’t working together. Job openings are approved without clear priorities. Candidates are sourced and roles are filled without first revising the skills the business will need next quarter or next year. HR leaders must strengthen alignment and connect hiring to business goals, design better candidate experiences, and use internal data and talent smartly. 1. Simplify the Hiring Journey Cut delays, reduce drop-offs, and speed up good decisions. Long applications, repeated interviews, and unclear job descriptions are hurting your results. Duplicate applications, broken job boards, and inflexible platforms frustrate qualified candidates and reduce inbound quality. Start with a full audit of your hiring process: Eliminate duplicate steps and remove tools that don’t talk to each other. Limit interviews to what’s truly necessary—3 is often enough. Make job descriptions clear, realistic, and aligned with the hiring manager’s needs. Communicate to candidates what to expect upfront, including timelines, stages, and who they will meet. 2. Focus on Skills, Not Just Job Titles Instead of filtering for résumés that match past jobs, define those skills that are essential for the role. Start with skills discovery: figure out what matters most for success, and then assess for it. Define key behavioral and transferable skills for each role (e.g., collaboration, learning agility). Use short, job-relevant assessments early in the funnel to screen for those skills. Match people to projects or responsibilities based on what they can do, not just what they have done. This opens up access to candidates from non-traditional backgrounds and supports internal mobility too. 3. Recruit With a Talent Strategy Tie every hire to business goals. Hiring reactively creates wasted spend and short-term fixes. Strategic recruiting starts with understanding where the business is going, and what roles and skills will be needed to get there. Treat workforce planning as a business-critical process. Look ahead: what capabilities will your teams need 12–24 months from now? Use market and internal data to plan hiring, upskilling, and redeployment together. 4. Rebuild Candidate Trust Candidates are fed up with unpaid assignments, ghosting, and vague salary ranges. According to Indeed, 31% of job seekers say a lack of pay transparency is the biggest barrier when applying for jobs. Include clear compensation ranges in every job post. Be honest about what’s required: assignments, timelines, working conditions. Use automation to send timely updates, even if it’s a rejection. Avoid ghosting. Involve hiring managers in co-designing the interview experience to make it more human and aligned with the team’s reality. 5. Use Technology to Make Things Easier Recruiters are overwhelmed with platforms, tools, plug-ins, and dashboards. Use technology to free up time for more conversations with people, which will result in better hiring decisions. But also, think of your tech stack like a product: would your candidate buy the user experience? Choose systems that connect: one-click apply, automated scheduling, and feedback collection. Stop forcing candidates to input the same data across multiple steps. Track drop-offs and find friction points: where are people quitting the process? Wrapping Up Strategic hiring begins with long-term planning. When hiring is connected to future business priorities and workforce plans, it becomes a powerful lever for growth, not just a response to immediate needs. A smooth and thoughtful process attracts stronger candidates. Clear job descriptions, timely communication, and structured interviews help create a positive experience that keeps the right talent engaged. Transparency and respect elevate the candidate experience. Sharing salary details, explaining next steps, and acknowledging candidates' time builds trust and strengthens the employer's reputation. Smart use of technology creates space for meaningful interactions. Automating repetitive tasks and streamlining steps allows recruiters and hiring teams to focus on strategic conversations and relationship-building. Hiring works best when it’s aligned with what the business truly needs. A well-calibrated strategy brings together the right skills, roles, and timing to support performance, development, and retention. Join us at the Summit If you’re building smarter, faster, and more inclusive hiring strategies, you don't want to miss this event! The Talent Strategy and Acquisition Summit (September 2–4, 2025) brings together top HR and talent leaders to explore what it takes to compete in today’s volatile talent market, while keeping long-term business goals in sight. Join senior leaders from companies of all sizes in three days of hands-on conversations about the future of recruiting, sourcing, internal mobility, and onboarding. Learn from sessions like: Aligning Talent Strategy with Business Needs Building Scalable and Inclusive Recruitment Frameworks Using Analytics to Track and Improve Hiring Metrics Designing an Employer Brand That Attracts Top Talent Preparing for 2026: Strategic Hiring Roadmaps and Capability Planning You’ll walk away with practical frameworks, peer-tested solutions, and new ideas to shape the future of hiring in your organization. 🌐 100% Online | Free Registration | Online Format (Panels, Workshops, Peer Exchanges) 🎓 Gain up to 13.5 HRCI + SHRM Credits JOIN US! Hacking HR We are powering the future of HR! Hacking HR is the fastest-growing global community of people leaders and professionals interested in all things at the intersection of people, organizations, innovation, transformation, workplace, and workforce, and more. We deliver value through hundreds of events a year, community engagement opportunities, learning programs, certificate programs, and more. tickets.subject: Case# 0003825989 - Customer Care Portal: New Account Request [ thread::fZ1sFcD8dgaOJSiO6yTMVHY:: ]

thread.body:
Hello Asif,

Thank you for reaching out to Genesys Customer Care

Before we can proceed with your request, please confirm if you have previously registered on the Genesys Customer Care website under a different employer.

If you were previously registered, please provide the name of your previous employer and confirm whether you are still affiliated with them.

We are looking forward to your response.

Thank you.

Regards,
Shaira
Customer Care - Data Admin

tickets.subject: Payment failure: Google Workspace Business Starter for aspirepath.co.in

thread.body:
From: "The Google Workspace Team" [workspace-noreply@google.com]
Subject:  Payment failure: Google Workspace Business Starter for aspirepath.co.in

Update payment method to avoid suspension

## Don't lose access to Google Workspace Business Starter

The last payment for your Google Workspace Business Starter subscription for aspirepath.co.in failed. This indicates that there's something wrong with your payment method.

To prevent the suspension of all services for all users on September 1, 2025:

  - Contact your bank or credit card company to resolve the issue with your payment method.

  - Sign in to your Google Admin console and click **Billing** to retry or update your payment method and pay your outstanding balance. If you can't resolve the issue, you'll need to add a new payment method instead.

See complete instructions for fixing payment and billing issues (https://support.google.com/a/answer/2523116?utm_source=9055414&utm_medium=email) or contact our support team (https://support.google.com/a/answer/1047213?utm_source=9055414&utm_medium=email) for additional help.

Sign in (https://admin.google.com)

Sincerely,

The Google Workspace Team


(C) 2025  Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043 *  Google Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., 8 Marina View, #30-01, Asia Square 1, Singapore 018960  *  Google Ireland Ltd, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland.

You're receiving this mandatory email service announcement to update you about important changes to your Google Workspace product or account.

tickets.subject: You’ve Been Considering Growth. Let’s Turn That Into Action.

thread.body:
Hi Aspirant,


You looked into upskilling a while ago. That tells us you’re thinking long-term. But here’s what’s changed: the stakes are now higher — and the opportunities, bigger.


According to a McKinsey report, companies with strong general management capabilities are 70% more likely to outperform their peers in profitability and growth. (Source: McKinsey & Company)


Here are a few programmes that could help put your ambition back in motion:


🔹 K. J. Somaiya Institute of Management Master of Business Administration (MBA) for Working Executives - Batch 06


Designed for busy professionals, this comprehensive programme combines flexible learning with real-world applications, ensuring you gain the skills needed to thrive in today’s competitive business world.


https://click.updates.timespro.com/?qs=07f8803f25d3f517400c8d051257108f233d5159a1242027dfd8f8b2c51e690fdb623485f187e9028b6973ad67fc7d44d3b87170278098d1148f6fc7f48993dc

Build your own vision. Whether launching a venture or scaling within, this helps you think and act like a founder.


https://click.updates.timespro.com/?qs=07f8803f25d3f5170113113c5b3a79ff34ac96aaa4e62b8ffe9aa51147d554485562eba384a504d6029059a7dcb20915c205f3d6b92de92814fc0d08a6ca04c6

Best,

thread.body:
Dear Cardmember,

Greetings from IDFC FIRST Bank, where we strive to always put you first.

You have crossed 80% limit on your IDFC First Bank Credit Card X2686.

To ensure uninterrupted card usage, please pay your current outstanding:
https://my.idfcfirstbank.com/creditcardBillPayment [
https://my.idfcfirstbank.com/creditcardBillPayment]

Now, you also get the convenience of overlimit facility. Click here to enable:
https://idfcfr.in/Slr737 [ https://idfcfr.in/Slr737] , if not done already
(TCA). Please note, charges are applicable on this service, if / when utilized.

This is an auto generated email. Please do not reply on this email.

Do not share your Card Number, CVV/Security Code, PIN, OTP, Internet Banking
User ID and Password with anyone, even if the caller claims to be a bank
employee. Sharing these details can lead to unauthorized access to your card
account.

Thank you for banking with us!

tickets.subject: What Makes a Customer Service Team Truly Scalable?

thread.body:
EOSGlobe Chronicles 

By EOSGlobe


By EOSGlobe

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-makes-customer-service-team-truly-scalable-eosglobe-swyuf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BdSmNOQBJRFuIw7fWi%2FAz5Q%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=1d9tmQm3ZpdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me19dgld~os-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me19dgld-os&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjI4ZGM2ZDE0ODkxYWM4OTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmI3NmRlZGM1ZjkwN2EyZGRiNDViZTc0NzkzMTBiMGVlMzU0NzJlZTNiZmQyM2EwYSwxLDE%3D
  
Scaling a customer service team doesn’t just mean adding/removing the headcount. It’s about building a system that grows with your business, without sacrificing quality. Many companies discover this the hard way when rapid growth leads to slower responses, inconsistent experiences, and overwhelmed teams. At EOSGlobe, we think of scalability as a strategy, not a scramble. It means preparing ahead: creating smart workflows, training agents to adapt to evolving customer needs, and integrating the right tech stack, like AI-assisted routing and omnichannel tools to lighten the load without losing the human touch. It also means anticipating diversity. As businesses expand into new markets, multilingual support and culturally relevant communication become just as important as speed. A scalable team isn’t just larger, it’s smarter, faster, and more capable of delivering consistent experiences to a global audience. Our approach to scalability focuses on building flexibility into the foundation, so when you grow, your CX operations don’t just keep up. They lead the way. Insightful Reads this Month How E-Commerce Brands Are Building Unstoppable CX with Outsourcing Online retailers are discovering that outsourcing isn't a cost-cutting hack; it's a growth strategy. Explore how leading e-commerce businesses are using outsourced support to improve service quality and scale smarter. Read more: Customer Experience Outsourcing: The Secret Weapon of Successful E-Commerce Brands The BPO Breakdown: What Services Can You Outsource? From customer support to finance to IT, BPO isn’t one-size-fits-all. This guide explains the key types of services businesses outsource and why the right partner makes all the difference. Explore more: Business Process Outsourcing and Types of BPO Services Back Office, Big Impact: What Growing Businesses Need to Know Hidden bottlenecks in your operations can quietly slow down growth. Learn how back office outsourcing clears the path for smoother processes, smarter teams, and better focus on core business goals. Find out more: Why Back Office Outsourcing Services Are Essential for Modern Businesses
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-makes-customer-service-team-truly-scalable-eosglobe-swyuf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BdSmNOQBJRFuIw7fWi%2FAz5Q%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=1d9tmQm3ZpdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me19dgld~os-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me19dgld-os&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjI4ZGM2ZDE0ODkxYWM4OTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmI3NmRlZGM1ZjkwN2EyZGRiNDViZTc0NzkzMTBiMGVlMzU0NzJlZTNiZmQyM2EwYSwxLDE%3D

tickets.subject: Apple Careers For Graduate- Fresh Graduates May Apply

thread.body:
Current Careers Opportunities 

By Career For Freshers


By Career For Freshers

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/apple-careers-graduate-fresh-graduates-may-apply-eianf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BIsHQK7VRQFC8UFMfoUDZSg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=0QhSTx15QtdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me178are~or-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me178are-or&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjE4NmNmZDk0NzlmYWY4ZDYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjk0NTBjNWVjZjU3NGY4ZTllOTBiMmFmYTQ4ODQxZmRiYWFhMGZiMzAyNTBiMTM2NywxLDE%3D
  
Apple Inc. is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California, that designs, develops, and sells consumer electronics,  computer software, and online services. It is considered one of the Big Four of technology along with Amazon, Google, and Facebook. Apple Careers Opportunities for Graduate, Fresher, Entry Level, Mid Level and Experience Professionals in various domain such as Technology, Engineering, Digital,  Software, Cyber, AI and many domains Apple is a place where extraordinary people gather to do their best work. Together we build products and experiences people once couldn’t have envisioned – and now can’t imagine living without. Are you excited by the idea of making a real impact? Are you prepared to dream big? Then a career with Apple might be your dream job! We are hiring @ Apple! Apple Early Career for Graduates 2025 Allocation Execution Specialist (12 months contract) – Singapore Job Description: – SAP tactical transactions, handling OEMs to ensure 100% fulfillment of products within the Asia Pacific region, supporting new product introduction team to ensure excellent execution of product launches. – Drive, support and participate in User-Acceptance Test and projects whilst providing inputs on process improvements to scale up the team – Coordinate and facilitate cross functional meetings to ensure timely execution – Work closely with various functional teams to ensure timely resolutions of disputes or discrepancies, achieve inventory management targets and potentially to lead and drive a group of specialists to meet operational goals. – Process, tools, and systems oriented. Ability to identify and propose process and system improvement Bachelor’s Degree in fields such as Engineering, Supply Chain, or Operations is preferred; Fresh graduates may apply for this role. Strong verbal and written communicator with the ability to articulate complex issues, findings or analysis to senior management in a clear and concise manner. Software Engineer, Applied ML Firmware Engineer For more details information to apply, Apple Graduate Careers, Click here!
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/apple-careers-graduate-fresh-graduates-may-apply-eianf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BIsHQK7VRQFC8UFMfoUDZSg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=0QhSTx15QtdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me178are~or-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me178are-or&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjE4NmNmZDk0NzlmYWY4ZDYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjk0NTBjNWVjZjU3NGY4ZTllOTBiMmFmYTQ4ODQxZmRiYWFhMGZiMzAyNTBiMTM2NywxLDE%3D

tickets.subject: Important notice: Scheduled Maintenance activity

thread.body:
Kotak

 

 



 

 

 


Click Here

 to see the web version

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Dear Customer,

 

To provide you with a seamless banking experience, our systems will be undergoing a maintenance activity.

 

Due to the scheduled maintenance, some services will not be available as per the details mentioned below.

 

 

 

Date

 

Services unavailable

 

 

 

9th Aug (Sat) 12.01 am to 2.00 am

 

1.Net banking, Mobile banking & UPI 

2.Kotak811 Mobile Banking application 

3.ATM* 

*No Impact on ATM transactions below Rs.20000

 

 

 

9th Aug (Sat) 12.01 am to 3.00 am

 

Payment gateway

 

 

 

10th Aug (Sun) 12.01 am to 2.00 am

 

IMPS, NEFT & RTGS via Net banking and Mobile banking

 


 

10th Aug (Sun) 12.01 am to 2.30 am

 

Debit /Spendz Card related services, ATM, POS including Contactless, ECOM, QR, Payment tokenization, Pin authentication & generation, Blocking or Unblocking of card and Card Controls.

 

 

 

We request you to kindly plan your banking activities in advance to avoid any inconvenience before the scheduled downtime.

 

We appreciate your understanding in this matter. Thank you for your continued trust in Kotak Mahindra Bank.

 

 Warm Regards, 

 Kotak Mahindra Bank 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 


Copyright & Disclaimer

 | 

Privacy Policy

We are a USD 6.5 billion company with 148,000+ professionals across 90 countries, helping 1255 global customers including Fortune 500 companies. thread.body:
A Social Safeguard R&R and Gender Expert  at SATRA Services and Solutions Private Limited in West Bengal, India is looking for help.

Submit proposal:https://www.linkedin.com/service-marketplace/projects/15199984585?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04%3BLI4%2BQJtLQ1y53testMu3Qw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=16cvPOFuHxebU1&ek=email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04&e=bze0lp-me25opi2-cd&eid=bze0lp-me25opi2-cd&m=hero&ts=submit_proposals&li=0&t=plh  


---------------------------------
          Sr.Social Safeguard R&R and Gender Expert .
        
          Third Degree Connection
        


---------------------------------

---------------------------------
If you’re interested in working on this project, submit a proposal today.

What happens after you’ve submitted a proposal?
Well share your proposal and LinkedIn profile with the client
The client will review your proposal and reach out if they are interested

In the meantime, if you have any questions or feedback for us, please reach out to us here.https://www.linkedin.com/comm/e/v2?urlhash=_4og&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fhelp%2Flinkedin%2Fask%2FSP-LISPQ&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04%3BLI4%2BQJtLQ1y53testMu3Qw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=16cvPOFuHxebU1&trk=eml-email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04-hero-0-contact_us&trkEmail=eml-email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04-hero-0-contact_us-null-bze0lp~me25opi2~cd-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me25opi2-cd

tickets.subject: Clash-Free Construction: Harnessing MEP BIM for Better Coordination

thread.body:
HitechDigital 

By Hitech Digital Solutions


By Hitech Digital Solutions

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/clash-free-construction-harnessing-mep-bim-better-pzu0f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BLhSRKliyR5alnRVCx8LzyQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2UuQU9ekAddHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me1fsy0s~w5-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1fsy0s-w5&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjM4Y2M4ZDA0MjlkYWU4ZjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjlhN2FlNWVmZTY3ZDkwZDlkMWIxYjcxMDg4M2ViYjA3NzM4MTc0YmQ1YTRmMGEyZiwxLDE%3D
  
Clash Detection and Coordination: The Power of MEP BIM in Reducing On-Site Conflicts Clash detection and coordination, driven by MEP BIM is no longer a luxury but a crucial part of construction planning and design. Our in-depth whitepaper on, “Clash Detection and Coordination: The Power of MEP BIM in Reducing On-Site Conflicts”, discusses how MEP engineers and other MEP professionals can achieve clash-free construction to save time and money. BIM ensures an efficient and smoother construction process with a high-quality final product through benefits including: Seamless collaboration: BIM fosters seamless communication and collaboration between project participants to enhance clarity and streamline the construction process. Clash-free construction: BIM identifies interferences between MEP systems before actual onsite work begins. This leads to seamless workflows and optimized schedule delivery. Reduced rework and waste: BIM enables prefabrication and modular construction to reduce material waste and on-site rework for an efficient and sustainable building process. Stop construction clashes from derailing your projects. Download our free whitepaper, “Clash Detection and Coordination: The Power of MEP BIM in Reducing On-Site Conflicts”, and eliminate costly clashes before they manifest on-site. Explore further details by reading the HitechDigital/WhitePaper
Join the conversation
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/clash-free-construction-harnessing-mep-bim-better-pzu0f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BLhSRKliyR5alnRVCx8LzyQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2UuQU9ekAddHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me1fsy0s~w5-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1fsy0s-w5&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjM4Y2M4ZDA0MjlkYWU4ZjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjlhN2FlNWVmZTY3ZDkwZDlkMWIxYjcxMDg4M2ViYjA3NzM4MTc0YmQ1YTRmMGEyZiwxLDE%3D

https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/curse-90-pr-club-why-good-isnt-enough-anymore-hecwf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BrxqpSjGYT5%2BnisPWwxnMuQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=1d9tmQm3ZpdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me19dgld~m7-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me19dgld-m7&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjI4ZGM2ZDI0MTk4YTk4ODYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjg0NTZjNWYwZGE0Yzk4ZDI1OGJhMTkzNzAzZWNmYjBmNmNiZTJlOTM5YmNkYmIxZiwxLDE%3D
  
Why High-Performance Ratio in Solar PV Systems Does Not Always Mean High Efficiency In solar PV operations, Performance Ratio (PR) is commonly regarded as a key metric for evaluating asset performance. Achieving a PR of 90 percent is often seen as a benchmark of operational excellence. However, for many utility-scale solar plants, a 90 percent PR may simply indicate untracked inefficiencies and not true optimization. While Performance Ratio links actual energy output to the theoretical maximum based on irradiance and installed capacity, it often lacks the granularity to detect deeper performance issues. PR calculations typically fail to normalize for environmental variability, site-specific degradation, and inverter-level anomalies. As a result, many solar assets reporting “strong” PRs are still underperforming financially and operationally. At Apollo Energy Analytics, we call this the 90% PR trap, a scenario where surface-level metrics obscure preventable losses. Our AI-powered O&M analytics platform uncovers these inefficiencies using high-frequency data, predictive fault diagnostics, and asset-specific performance baselines. Global Solar Capacity Is Rising, But Performance Monitoring Hasn’t Evolved As of 2025, global installed solar PV capacity is expected to reach 2.0 terawatts (TW), with projections exceeding 7.0 TW by 2030. This rapid growth is led by utility-scale solar developments across the Asia-Pacific region, the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), Latin America, and North America. Despite advancements in photovoltaic module efficiency, solar tracker systems, inverter controls, and SCADA infrastructure, median PR values remain stagnant at 80 to 90 percent. This performance ceiling indicates a systemic gap in how solar asset performance is monitored and managed. Common shortcomings in current PR reporting practices include: Inconsistent normalization for curtailment or extreme weather events Reliance on generalized or inaccurate irradiance inputs Aggregated string or inverter performance masking localized inefficiencies Infrequent updates that fail to capture transient or intermittent faults These issues result in solar plants appearing efficient on paper while generating well below their true potential. Performance Ratio Above 90% May Still Conceal Yield Losses A 90 percent PR may meet contractual service levels, but it does not guarantee high energy generation or ROI. In Apollo’s solar portfolio diagnostics, we consistently identify sites with PRs above 90 percent that are losing 4 to 8 percent of potential generation due to undetected or unclassified faults. Key Hidden Loss Factors in Utility-Scale Solar Assets 1. Localized Soiling Losses Most sites use a single soiling station to estimate loss across the plant. However, regional factors such as wind flow, terrain, and vegetation can cause uneven soiling, leading to untracked string-level losses. 2. Inverter Clipping Misclassification DC overloading is common but clipping events during high irradiance often go unflagged or are misclassified. This leads to performance overestimation and masks design issues. 3. Lack of Degradation Monitoring Conventional PR calculations assume uniform degradation. In reality, component-level degradation (e.g., MC4 connectors, junction boxes) can cause mismatch losses that are not flagged by SCADA. 4. MPPT Algorithm Inefficiencies Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) optimization is critical under variable conditions. Faulty firmware or improper tuning can cause suboptimal energy harvest without raising alerts. 5. Curtailment Data Inconsistencies Manual or inconsistent normalization of curtailment can distort PR values and create false baselines, especially in grid-constrained or merchant market environments. Diagnosing Hidden Losses at a 100 MW Solar PV Plant Apollo Energy Analytics recently conducted a detailed performance assessment of a 100 MW solar power plant in Rajasthan, India. The site reported a PR of 91.2 percent and showed no active inverter alarms at onboarding. Upon deploying Apollo’s AI-based digital twin and anomaly detection tools, several issues were identified: Undetected inverter clipping during peak solar hours Faulty backplane irradiance sensor skewing Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) readings Thermal resistance in MC4 connectors causing string underperformance Tracker misalignment leading to recurring shading losses Following targeted interventions, the site’s PR increased to 94.5 percent. More critically, net monthly generation improved by 3.8 percent, translating to approximately INR 13.4 million (USD 160,000) in annualized revenue uplift. This case study illustrates how high-resolution diagnostics can unlock hidden value even in “high-performing” solar assets. Why PR Alone Is Insufficient for Modern Solar O&M Performance Ratio serves as a baseline metric but lacks the diagnostic depth required for intelligent O&M. To optimize asset lifecycle value, solar operators require: Real-time string and inverter-level monitoring Predictive fault modeling and component health scoring Automated classification of thermal, electrical, and mechanical losses Contextual loss analytics that correlate weather, degradation, and control logic Apollo’s O&M analytics platform delivers these capabilities using a cloud-native architecture, machine learning models, and domain-specific digital twins for solar PV assets. Key features include: High-frequency fault diagnostics Weather-adjusted performance baselines Portfolio-level benchmarking across geographies Advanced loss attribution across O&M categories By shifting from reactive maintenance to predictive operations, asset owners can maximize uptime, minimize intervention costs, and improve investor returns. Introducing PR+: The New Standard for Solar Asset Intelligence To address the limitations of traditional PR, Apollo introduces PR+, a next-generation performance measurement framework purpose-built for modern renewable portfolios. PR+ Includes: Real-time degradation modeling using unsupervised learning Dynamic baseline creation at the block and inverter level Advanced soiling detection algorithms based on string performance variance Automated curtailment tagging and clipping event reclassification PR+ enables component-level root cause analysis, real-time alerting, and performance forecasts under various operating scenarios. It provides a granular understanding of site behavior and performance loss mapping that goes well beyond basic PR dashboards. From Reactive Monitoring to Predictive, Data-Driven Operations As solar PV becomes a cornerstone of national energy portfolios, the industry must evolve from passive monitoring to proactive optimization. The increasing financial exposure tied to underperformance makes this shift critical. Apollo supports this transition with an integrated intelligence platform designed to: Increase yield recovery through early loss detection Reduce operational expenditure via targeted maintenance Extend component lifespan with predictive degradation tracking Improve compliance and reporting with standardized, auditable analytics By closing the gap between “reported” and “actual” performance, Apollo ensures that solar assets deliver their full potential. Why 90% PR Should No Longer Be the Industry’s Gold Standard If your asset is reporting a 90 percent PR, it may appear efficient compared to industry benchmarks. However, relying solely on this metric risks overlooking performance degraders that impact long-term financial outcomes. Apollo Energy Analytics provides a comprehensive analytics layer that elevates O&M from compliance to optimization. Our approach reveals the delta between theoretical and actual performance, helping stakeholders make data-backed decisions that improve asset bankability and IRR. To schedule your PR audit or learn more, at www.apolloenergyanalytics.com or connect with our team today!

thread.body:
Current Careers Opportunities 

By Career For Freshers


By Career For Freshers

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/level-entry-jobs-dell-careers-apply-now-career-for-freshers-nul5f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BPLJYeYlvSi2%2BULOU5cmizA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=32yIwtBA-dhbU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me54d33b~ii-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me54d33b-ii&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUwYmQ4OWNkZDA0OTljYTY4ZjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmI3NDhlMmRlZTY1MThlZTg4MmNjMjdjNjIwMDNjYzRjYWUzZWRjMmU3MzUxOTFlMCwxLDE%3D
  
Dell provides the technology that transforms the way we all work and live. But we are more than a technology company — we are a people company. We inspire, challenge and respect every one of our over 100,000 employees. We also provide them with unparalleled growth and development opportunities. We can’t wait for you to discover this for yourself as a Technician, Technical Support on our Technical Support Team in Bangalore  Dell Technologies Career Opportunities for Graduate Entry Level Fresher role,  Dell Jobs Vacancies in Europe, Australia, Asia, USA, Job Opportunities at  Dell Careers for Fresher, Dell Recruitment 2025 What’s most important to us is that you are respected, feel like you can be yourself and have the opportunity to do the best work of your life — while still having a life. We offer excellent benefits, bonus programs, flexible work arrangements, a variety of career development opportunities, employee resource groups, and much more. Entry Level Graduates Careers at Dell Technologies NextGen Sales Academy Associate Inside Sales Rep 2025 Be immersed in the sales and technology industry by talking to and building relationships with customers as well as qualifying opportunities to drive company revenue Have consistent engagement and collaboration with the NGSA management team, inside sales teams, field sales teams, renewals teams, and development team Participate in white board competitions, group messaging competitions, and meet metrics expectations Job Requirements Completed Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree prior to start date Passionate about a sales career in the technology industry Strong verbal and written communication skills Relationship building and interpersonal skills Desirable: A leader with resilient work ethic who is reliable, confident, collaborative, driven and coachable Ability to influence others and convey a sense of urgency to drive issues to closure Data Scientist – US Software Engineer – Malaysia As a Software Engineer, you will be responsible for developing sophisticated systems and software basis the customer’s business goals, needs and general business environment creating software solutions. Inside Sales Account Executive – India As a Inside Sales Account Manager you will be responsible for selling Dell’s products and services while focusing on developing new accounts and expanding existing accounts. You will support the field sales leader while working effectively in a team environment towards goals. For more details information to apply, Dell Graduate Careers, Click here!
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/level-entry-jobs-dell-careers-apply-now-career-for-freshers-nul5f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BPLJYeYlvSi2%2BULOU5cmizA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=32yIwtBA-dhbU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me54d33b~ii-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me54d33b-ii&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUwYmQ4OWNkZDA0OTljYTY4ZjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmI3NDhlMmRlZTY1MThlZTg4MmNjMjdjNjIwMDNjYzRjYWUzZWRjMmU3MzUxOTFlMCwxLDE%3D

tickets.subject: Seasoned Experts vs Scrappy Doers: Who Belongs on Your Team?

thread.body:
Talent For Nationhood

By CareerXperts Consulting 


By CareerXperts Consulting 

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/seasoned-experts-vs-scrappy-doers-who-belongs-o6pxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BDlceuyTLQteNf2ofqnXFFQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=23yhdohwemdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me1bimpu~ek-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1bimpu-ek&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjI4OWNhZDY0ODlkYTg4YTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmEwN2FjN2ZkZjg0NzhiZDNlZjVkZjlkYTYzNGNmOGQ5ZTcxNTU3MjI4OGYzZmYxMSwxLDE%3D
  
Picture this: You’re building something big. Your vision is sharp, your mission is clear - but now comes the real challenge… assembling the right crew. On one side, you've got the seasoned experts - sharp resumes, years of experience, battle-tested instincts. These folks have seen markets rise and fall, products soar and crash, and they've got the scar tissue (and strategy decks) to prove it. On the other side, you've got the scrappy doers - relentless energy, lean mindsets, and a hunger so real it could probably code, pitch, and redesign your roadmap all before lunch. They move fast, ask fewer questions, and figure things out mid-jump. So… who do you bet on? The truth is, this isn’t about choosing sides. It’s about knowing when each mindset creates the most value - and how to build a team that doesn’t just function, but fires on all cylinders. Let's break it down. The Wisdom of Experience: Why You Need People Who’ve Been Around the Block “In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.” - Albert Einstein There’s something powerful about people who’ve been through the fire - and stayed to write the debrief. Seasoned experts bring pattern recognition that only time can teach. They’ve made hard calls with imperfect data. They’ve managed crises when Slack wasn’t loading and the CFO was breathing down their neck. Their knowledge isn’t just theoretical - it’s earned, tested, and often quietly brilliant. What they offer: Strategic depth: They don’t just react - they anticipate. Risk calibration: They’ve learned the difference between bold and reckless. Mentorship value: One conversation with them can save a younger teammate six weeks of rabbit holes. But here’s where the nuance lies - experience doesn’t always mean comfort with ambiguity. Sometimes, with wisdom comes resistance to chaos. And if your company is mid-pivot or still figuring out product-market fit, you might need more than polish. You need motion. Enter the Scrappy Doers: Built for Chaos, Wired for Action “Done is better than perfect.” - Sheryl Sandberg You’ve seen them. Heck, you may be them. These are the ones who’ll prototype a user flow on a napkin at 2am and then figure out how to ship it by Monday. They aren’t here to preserve - they’re here to push. Scrappy doers don’t wait for green lights. They read between the lines, break things (sometimes intentionally), and learn by doing. They're not reckless - they're resourceful. And that’s a different kind of intelligence. What they bring: Speed and bias for action: They don’t let “lack of clarity” slow them down. Fresh thinking: They’re not boxed in by “how it’s always been done.” Ownership mentality: With them, there’s no “that’s not my job” - it’s all hands, all the time. But even scrappiness has a cost. Inexperience can lead to rework. Speed can cause blind spots. And without the right feedback loops, energy without direction burns out fast. The Real Question Isn’t Who’s Better - It’s When They’re Better This isn’t a hiring rivalry. It’s not The Interns vs The Avengers. The smartest teams know that expertise and scrappiness aren’t at odds. They’re complementary muscles. The question is: When do you flex which? Early stage chaos? Stack your team with scrappy builders who can thrive without structure. Scaling up? Bring in seasoned folks who can turn that chaos into systems - and bring calm to the storm. In transition? Look for people who can straddle both - they may not tick all boxes, but they’re often your best culture carriers. In fact, the most valuable people in any company are the ones who evolve - who start scrappy and grow into wisdom, or who’ve been around but still carry the fire to learn something new. The Real Art: Building a Team That Mixes Fire and Foundation “If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.” -African Proverb Too many companies fall into the trap of over-indexing on one type: All-experts: Polished decks, elegant strategies… slow motion. All-doers: Rapid iteration, zero documentation… chaos on a loop. What you want is creative friction - not chaos, not comfort, but that productive tension where scrappy doers pull the team forward and seasoned experts keep it on the rails. To make that work: Ditch the ego hiring. Hiring someone “impressive” on paper means nothing if they don’t fit your current phase. Design for tension, not harmony. You don’t want everyone agreeing - you want people challenging each other from different lenses. Watch how they listen. Doers who can take feedback, and experts who can be challenged - those are your glue. Culture doesn’t come from alignment. It comes from shared respect between very different brains. Hire the Puzzle, Not Just the Pieces This isn't about one being better than the other. It's about building something that lasts -and that moves. You need people who can think before acting. And others who act before overthinking. People who ask “why?” and others who ask “why not?” The winning team isn’t one type. It’s a mix - fire starters and steady hands, skeptics and dreamers, the ones who ask tough questions and the ones who just quietly build. So next time you're hiring, ask yourself: “Does this person solve the problems we have right now - or are we hiring them for the ones we wish we had?” It’s not what’s on the resume - it’s whether it fits the moment you’re in. Hire for the now. Build for the future. And never underestimate the power of a team that stretches across the spectrum. Partner with CareerXperts to find the talent that will shape your future. Contact us today to redefine your talent acquisition strategy. Here's a snapshot of what we're all about: Hiring? We're here to Help! CareerXperts Workforce Solutions: CX Workforce Candidate Jobs Portal: High impact job opportunities On-Demand Talent: CareerXperts ODT Personalized Recruitment Solutions: Recruitment Solutions | RPO Customer Stories: Hear from our clients and candidates We're always talking about careers here: Deep Career Conversations Insights on Startup Growth and Success: Deep Startup Insights Deep Career Conversations: Career Enablement Program. Fill out this form if you are looking to get your Career Health Diagnosed! Our WhatsApp Channel: CareerTalks by CareerXperts
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/seasoned-experts-vs-scrappy-doers-who-belongs-o6pxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BDlceuyTLQteNf2ofqnXFFQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=23yhdohwemdrU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me1bimpu~ek-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1bimpu-ek&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjI4OWNhZDY0ODlkYTg4YTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmEwN2FjN2ZkZjg0NzhiZDNlZjVkZjlkYTYzNGNmOGQ5ZTcxNTU3MjI4OGYzZmYxMSwxLDE%3D
  
      

----------------------------------------

fighting for their lives in the NICU.

They are just days old, underweight, and unable to breathe on their own. Doctors
say they’ll need 2 to 3 months of intensive care. The total treatment cost is
₹20,17,000.

Ramya and her husband have already spent ₹2 lakhs through loans. With no land,
gold, or support left, they’re desperate to save their firstborn children.

Please keep them in your prayers.

thread.body:
Current Careers Opportunities 

By Career For Freshers


By Career For Freshers

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/job-opportunities-dell-various-entry-level-role-career-for-freshers-ueh0f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BwS%2Fxi300QQaCXui%2FycOniw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=3QP-x3ePR9dHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me1hy3mj~0-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1hy3mj-0&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjM4OGNjZDA0MDliYWY4ZTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmViNzVkM2IxZjQ0Njg0ZWMzNjM3ZThlNjg4YmRkMTcwYTg0Yzg3NGY3OTc1YWQ2MCwxLDE%3D
  
 Dell provides the technology that transforms the way we all work and live. But we are more than a technology company — we are a people company. We inspire, challenge and respect every one of our over 100,000 employees. We also provide them with unparalleled growth and development opportunities. We can’t wait for you to discover this for yourself as a Technician, Technical Support on our Technical Support Team in Bangalore Dell Technologies Career Opportunities for Graduate Entry Level Fresher role,  Dell Jobs Vacancies in Europe, Australia, Asia, USA, Job Opportunities at  Dell Careers for Fresher, Dell Recruitment 2025 What’s most important to us is that you are respected, feel like you can be yourself and have the opportunity to do the best work of your life — while still having a life. We offer excellent benefits, bonus programs, flexible work arrangements, a variety of career development opportunities, employee resource groups, and much more. Graduates Careers at Dell Technologies See Yourself Here. Find a Career That Inspires You! Competitive Analysis Engineer We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Competitive Analysis Engineer to join our team and help shape the future of our product designs. The ideal candidate will be responsible for conducting competitive evaluations across our portfolio and help improve current and next-generation designs. Support the DTV competitive analysis strategy and deliverables through product evaluations across the Client Solutions Group (CSG) portfolio Perform comprehensive product assessments, including user experience evaluations, hardware/software analysis, physical teardowns, system-level testing, and cost benchmarking Deliver detailed, data-driven reports and presentations that inform and influence product differentiation Collaborate closely with platform core team members to ensure strong cross-functional alignment and knowledge sharing Continuously refine and enhance our competitive analysis process to deliver actionable insights Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field; multidisciplinary engineering background preferred Test Engineer 1 – Singapore As a Test Engineer, you will develop and document test plans for newly developed or current hardware and solutions products. You will partner with a test team during test execution and report results to development engineers and leadership. Analyst, Customer Technical Training (Fresh Graduate) – Malaysia As a Customer/Technical Training Analyst, you will delivering, designing, authoring or editing advanced level e-learning, web-based, blended and classroom curriculum to a variety of audiences. Software Engineer 2 – India As a  Software Engineer, you will be responsible for developing sophisticated systems and software basis the customer’s business goals, needs and general business environment creating software solutions. Technical Support Engineer 2 – India As a Technical Support Engineer, you will resolve Enterprise Server based Complex Technical Issues in a fast-paced, customer critical environment, working on improving processes, standards and strategies to perfect our Support Services. You will Collaboratively Work with L2 / L3 from Hardware and Software (Operating System and SysMan) perspective. Server Rack Engineer – USA As a Rack Engineer, you will be responsible for the complete and detailed design of rack-based compute, cloud and storage solutions. For more details information to apply Dell Graduate Careers, Click here!
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/job-opportunities-dell-various-entry-level-role-career-for-freshers-ueh0f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BwS%2Fxi300QQaCXui%2FycOniw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=3QP-x3ePR9dHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me1hy3mj~0-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1hy3mj-0&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYjM4OGNjZDA0MDliYWY4ZTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmViNzVkM2IxZjQ0Njg0ZWMzNjM3ZThlNjg4YmRkMTcwYTg0Yzg3NGY3OTc1YWQ2MCwxLDE%3D

To your first inspiration...

thread.body:
This one's for all the siblings who made you dream a little bigger, try a little
harder and get back up every time you failed. They’ve seen every version of you
and always rooted for all of them. So today, wish them and celebrate the ones
who never let you forget what you're capable of 🚀

tickets.subject: Struggling with your resume? AI can help!

thread.body:
Hi ASIF, 
 The team at VisualCV is excited to announce some huge improvements to the AI Resume Writer: Style, length and language customization! 
 With VisualCV's new AI Resume Writer Settings panel, you can easily adjust: 
 - Style: Select whether you want the AI to use a neutral or personal tone. 
- Length: Choose if you would like the AI output to be longer or shorter. 
- Language: Choose from a list of languages, or allow the AI to detect your language automatically. 
 [Image "image.png?expires=1767189312&signature=42f5e5e6fa0a0f324451f9fc4024f0ba4e7b959300b6bf36832c90afc4a65c4c&req=dSMhH8l9m4BfUPMW2XS%2Fif4fiVPiFxc5zRS0tjeS77EZc74doYI%3D%0A"] 
 ​ 
 To try out the AI Resume Writer Settings: 
 1. Open your resume. 
2. Click the Improve with AI button on a Work Experience or Summary item to generate an AI content suggestion. 
3. Below the AI suggestion, click Customize. 
 [Image "image.png?expires=1767189312&signature=8a155d3f3f8647c0e6b6b609e4637eea6ec62cd8ee3ef603cf0119d7ce8d7c0d&req=dSMhH8l9lIJbXvMW2XS%2FiVhPD2dh9jJfynlVPbPq3FochlfDHOM%3D%0A"] 
 This will open the AI Resume Writer Settings modal. 
 Update your settings as needed, then click Save and Regenerate. Your settings will be saved. Your preferences will apply to all content generated by the AI Resume Writer until you update your settings again. 
 Try the new AI Resume Writer 
 We hope these improvements will make the AI Resume Writer even more useful for your job search. 
 More information about the AI Resume Writer can be found in our Help Centre. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. 
 Best, The VisualCV Team

Wells Fargo & Company is an American multinational financial services company with a significant global presence. The company operates in 35 countries and serves over 70 million customers worldwide. It is a systemically important financial institution according to the Financial Stability Board, and is considered one of the “Big Four Banks” in the United States, alongside JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, and Citigroup. Wells Fargo Careers Opportunities for Graduate Entry Level role Freshers in various domain banking, finance, Investment, Legal, HR, Business, Marketing, Sales, Technology, Engineering and many more The company’s primary subsidiary is Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national bank that designates its Sioux Falls, South Dakota, site as its main office (and therefore is treated by most U.S. federal courts as a citizen of South Dakota). Early Careers | Wells Fargo in 2025 Technology Business Systems Associate Job Description:  Participate in researching, evaluating and investigating low complexity transactions and data to meet business requirements Review basic technical business problems that can be resolved with automated systems related to low-risk tasks and deliverables Receive direction from supervisors and exercise judgement within defined parameters in the development of guidelines for the use of result tracking systems Coordinate project plans, schedules, budgets and provide information to managers, functional colleagues and stakeholders within technology business systems operations Interact with experienced Business Systems Consultants on revising existing automated systems that are cost effective and meet business requirements Work with user groups to provide training, resolve questions, assess user needs, and make necessary changes to the database Securities Research Associate Financial Accounting Associate Technology Business Systems Consultant For more details information to apply Well Fargo Graduate Careers, Click here!

tickets.subject: Alert Taxpayers: Tax Notices Are Being Issued-Avoid One with ClearTax

thread.body:
The Income Tax department has stepped up scrutiny this year, and many filers are already facing tax notices. Don't risk errors that could trigger one for you!















Here are common mistakes that lead to tax notices:
















1)Data Mismatch: 

This is the big one. If the capital gains you report don't perfectly match the data in your AIS and Form 26AS, it triggers an automatic notice.















2)Using the Wrong ITR Form:

 Reporting capital gains requires ITR-2 or ITR-3. Filing with a simpler form like ITR-1 is an instant error and a guaranteed way to get flagged.
















3)Forgetting Small Gains: 

Did you sell a few mutual funds or shares from a rarely used account? It's easy to forget, but the tax department won't. Every single transaction is reported to them.
















4)No Advance Tax: 

Your tax was over ₹10,000, but you didn't pay it in advance, leading to a notice for tax due plus interest.















With ClearTax, you can avoid these errors effortlessly.
















1)Auto-import data 

from 80+ brokers.















2)Pre-filled details for

 TDS and capital gains.















3)Accurate, error-free filing

 in minutes.































What if I still get a notice?






We’ve got you covered. ClearTax handles all tax notices for you, free of charge.



Take the stress out of tax filing. Click below to file your taxes securely with ClearTax:
















Start Your Filing Now

































Receive a 

Flat 66%

 Discount on ClearTax.




Use Code: 


TAXPRO
































Happy Filing




Team ClearTax

tickets.subject: Water conservation

thread.body:
Energy to the World

By aramco


By aramco

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/water-conservation-aramco-puwsf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3B%2FU8AxGnKQCCGT4yO4aifPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2puqDDydWOdXU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me1ut28i~50-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1ut28i-50&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYmQ4N2M2ZDg0MDlkYWU4ZTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjlkNjVlZGM2ZDc3ZDkzY2U0OWM0OGQzOTQwZDA1MjNlOWIxZTI0OTZlYTM0MmFmYywxLDE%3D
  
Our water conservation roadmap governs our use of this precious resource. As an energy company founded and operating in a desert nation, we understand the importance of managing water resources and have a long history of applying circular principles to our water management practices. Our water conservation roadmap governs our use of this precious resource in our operations, ensuring that we supplement water supplies with nontraditional sources, implement water-efficient practices, increase wastewater reuse, reduce water losses, and promote water-conservation awareness among our employees and their families, as well as in local communities. We provide comprehensive assessments of the Kingdom’s water and energy infrastructure, and demand forecasts, and collaborate with government, local authorities, and regulators to mitigate our impact on communities. Our policy in action Aramco created our original Water Conservation Policy in 2011, and updated it in 2020, expanding it to cover our latest water conservation strategies. The Company’s freshwater consumption in the Kingdom is about 30 million cubic meters, which is about 0.2% of the Kingdom’s annual groundwater demand, the vast majority of which (70% as of 2023 according to according to Saudi Arabia’s Ministry of Water, Environment, and Agriculture) is utilized for agriculture.  We aim to source 60% of our freshwater from regions that are not classified as water-stressed. And we disclose our usage figures in our annual Sustainability Report. Thanks to our ongoing investment and conservation efforts, as of the end of 2024, the freshwater consumption recorded for Aramco’s wholly owned and operated facilities was 83 million cubic meters of freshwater, a reduction of 7.7% compared to our 2023 figure (89.9 million cubic meters). Qurayyah Sea Water Plant In the late 1970s, Aramco established the Qurayyah Sea Water Plant to inject seawater, rather than groundwater, into reservoirs for the process of enhanced oil recovery. The treated seawater is conveyed through a complex pipeline network to hundreds of injection wells.  Through this plant alone, Aramco has been able to conserve more than 160 billion gallons of groundwater annually, since 1978.
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/water-conservation-aramco-puwsf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3B%2FU8AxGnKQCCGT4yO4aifPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2puqDDydWOdXU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me1ut28i~50-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me1ut28i-50&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUyYmQ4N2M2ZDg0MDlkYWU4ZTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjlkNjVlZGM2ZDc3ZDkzY2U0OWM0OGQzOTQwZDA1MjNlOWIxZTI0OTZlYTM0MmFmYywxLDE%3D
