tickets.subject: Cyble Chronicles-August 1: Latest Findings & Recommendations for the Cybersecurity Community

thread.body:
Cybersecurity Journal

By Cyble


By Cyble

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/cyble-chronicles-august-1-latest-findings-recommendations-rc4yc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3B2mLUR1uJT%2BePLY4lTlZcEg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=1TSFrFX5kReXU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me2qygpr~i6-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me2qygpr-i6&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUxYjE4ZGM5ZDg0MTkxYWU4NjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZjlmNjRlN2NhODk0NTlhZDUyOTc2OTY1MDNjZjNjZTI4MzAyNDQxNzM2NjE2YTBlMiwxLDE%3D
  
RedHook: A New Android Banking Trojan Targeting Users in Vietnam   Cyble Research and Intelligence Labs (CRIL) uncovered 'RedHook', an advanced Android banking trojan targeting Vietnamese users via fake government and financial websites. It uses WebSocket for C2 communication and supports 30+ remote commands for full device control. Evidence points to a Chinese-speaking threat actor behind its development. Read More..   Maritime Sector Faces Surge in APT and Hacktivist Cyber Threats   A recent Cyble report revealed over 100 cyberattacks targeting the maritime and shipping industry, driven by APT groups, ransomware gangs, financially motivated actors, and hacktivists amid rising geopolitical tensions. Read More..   The Week in Vulnerabilities: 1 in 5 New Vulnerabilities Exploited Quickly Cyble’s Vulnerability Intelligence team tracked 737 vulnerabilities last week, with over 145 already having publicly available Proof-of-Concepts (PoCs). This reflects an exploitation potential just under the 21% rate observed in the previous week. Read More..   Botshield:   Cyble’s BotShield is an advanced defense solution built to protect your digital infrastructure from botnet-driven threats like DDoS attacks, Command-and-Control (C2) communications, and compromised endpoint exploitation. With early detection capabilities and deep visibility into botnet activity, BotShield enables organizations to stay ahead of emerging threats and ensure uninterrupted operations.  Learn more.. Threat Actor Profile: Axiom    Axiom, or Group 72, is a state-sponsored cyber threat actor targeting high-value organizations in Asia and the U.S., known for its sophisticated cyberespionage campaigns and extensive malware toolkit for data theft and network infiltration.Its operations reflect a high level of coordination, funding, and strategic intent aligned with national interests. Read More..   Stop Threats Before They Hit – See What Others Miss  Join Cyble and Alliance Distribution on August 14 at 10:00 AM & 2:00 PM (GMT+3) for a live webinar on gaining proactive visibility into emerging cyber risks. Reserve your spot here. Experience Cyble at BlackHat 2025 – Booth #6034   Join the world’s top cybersecurity minds at Mandalay Bay, Las Vegas from August 2–7, 2025. As a Silver Sponsor, Cyble invites you to explore the industry’s first true intelligence-driven, AI-native security platform—purpose-built to secure cloud infrastructure, monitor the dark web, and manage third-party risks at scale.  Connect with Cyble’s cybersecurity specialists, explore advanced threat intelligence capabilities, and schedule your  Personalized Demo Today. Cyble at the 29th Edition BFSI IT Summit 2025  📅 August 7, 2025 | 📍 JW Marriott, Juhu, Mumbai  Proud Gold Partner empowering the BFSI sector with AI-native cybersecurity to detect threats, secure environments, and prevent breaches—meet our experts or book a personalized demo here.    Cyble at AISA Melbourne CyberCon2025 – Booth 55    Meet us from October 15–17 at the Melbourne Convention & Exhibition Centre as a Platinum + Coffee Cart Sponsor. Explore cutting-edge innovations in threat intelligence, dark web monitoring, and digital risk protection—powered by the world’s leading intelligence-driven, AI-native cybersecurity platform.     Discover Cyble’s AI-driven platform—connect with our team for a personalized demo tailored to your needs.    Cyble at GovWare 2025 – Singapore’s Premier Cybersecurity Event  Visit us at Booth E22, Sands Expo | Oct 21–23, 2025 — Explore advanced solutions in Threat Intelligence, Digital Risk Protection, and more. Get insights into how Cyble is helping organizations strengthen cyber resilience globally.  Experience Cyble’s AI-powered platform. Schedule a personalized demo to see how it fits your unique security needs.    Ready to elevate your cybersecurity strategy?   Discover how Cyble’s cutting-edge platforms empower you to stay one step ahead of cyber adversaries and keep your organization secure. 
Keep reading on LinkedIn

tickets.subject: Trump’s Tariffs: A Roadblock For India’s New Age IPOs?

thread.body:
Inc42 Markets

By Inc42 Media


By Inc42 Media

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/trumps-tariffs-roadblock-indias-new-age-ipos-inc42-yxdvc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3Bw6%2FK1OCuR1GM9a5RVdjOxg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2d0GypiaIThHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me5jnjlz~6f-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me5jnjlz-6f&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWVmYjY4ZWM3ZDA0NzkwYWM4NjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmUyNTFlYWRlZDI0NWFjZWNhZGFiNWMxYjk2NWM3MjYxZWM4MDJjOTkyN2Q1NDkzZCwxLDE%3D
  
Dear reader,  "No power on Earth can stop an idea whose time has come." When the late Dr. Manmohan Singh borrowed Victor Hugo’s words in 1991, India was opening its economy to the world. Three decades later — well after Singh’s two-term tenure as India’s Prime Minister —  the spirit of that moment faces a very different test: what happens when the world starts closing its doors to India? This past week, US President Donald Trump announced an additional 25% ad valorem duty on Indian goods, effective later this month, lifting effective tariff rates for some items to around 50% once you strip out exemptions.  From an investor’s perspective, this isn’t just a geopolitical headline. The US is India’s single largest export market, $86.5 Bn in goods went that way in FY25, and the composition of those exports matters. Tariffs were once again the talk of the town.  Electronics, chemicals, textiles, pharma: all have high US shares. SBI Research estimates that in pharma alone, a tariff of this size could slice 5–10% off earnings for big exporters. Goldman Sachs puts the macro GDP drag at around 0.3 percentage points, small for the whole economy, but significant in concentrated pockets. The “Direct Hit” Sectors Two classic examples are home textiles and seafood. India’s home textile sector sends roughly 60% of its exports to the US. When tariffs lift landed costs for those goods, they lose price competitiveness in Walmart aisles and Amazon baskets overnight. Seafood is smaller in market-cap terms but has a similar dynamic. Shrimp and frozen food majors like Apex Frozen Foods rely heavily on the US. A tariff this size, without offsetting incentives, will show up in quarterly numbers almost immediately. As per Bhatia, in the medium term, these exporters will have to accelerate diversification to the UK and EU, where free trade agreements are already in place. That’s not just theory, textile players have been probing European buyers since FTA terms were announced.  “Unless you diversify into the European Union or UK, you lose competitiveness compared to Bangladesh,” he said. For IPO-bound startups, the story is different but connected. Tariffs may not hit many of them directly, but if a large portion of their revenue depends on exports to the US, the timing of their listing could be in jeopardy. As Bhatia put it: “If they are significantly dependent on the US, say, 20–25% of their revenue, the impact will be meaningful. They would have to postpone their IPO plan and re-strategise. Below that level, the effect will be there but more manageable. The real concern comes when US revenue forms a large share of the business; then, postponement becomes the prudent move.” In practice, this means that a company with a model like Nykaa, if deriving 15–20% of sales from the US, would have to weigh whether to push back its IPO until the tariff situation stabilises. But a company like Lenskart, opening stores in the US but fulfilling locally, may see minimal impact and could still go ahead. Thankfully, there aren’t many IPO-ready startups directly exposed to these duties, says Rajat Rajan, analyst at Kotak Mahindra Capital. He believes the situation is still unfolding, and it is yet to be determined if any new-age company will be materially affected.  Still, the current tariff uncertainty will make bankers, founders and investors more cautious in setting listing dates if US revenue is a meaningful slice of the pie. A Colder Funding Climate?  One quiet but important channel: foreign investor sentiment. Several global funds looking at Indian tech IPOs have US LPs and face their own geopolitical risk parameters. An active tariff war can lead them to widen required returns, slow deployment or push portfolio companies to pivot market strategies. However, Bhatia believes that India’s macroeconomic data is quite stable. “There may be a few short-term fluctuations, but ultimately your earnings will matter quarter-to-quarter,” he said. According to him, while Q1 wasn’t so great, profitability has improved for Indian companies because of lower raw material costs. Operating profit and bottom line have improved, even if the top line is muted. Valuations are also correcting across sectors. A few months ago, small-cap along with mid-cap valuations were at their peak; now they’ve started to correct. Further, India also has a lower interest rate environment. Private capex is set to pick up, maybe by mid-2026. India’s GDP growth is expected at 6.25–6.5% as well. All these factors, as per Bhatia, will keep attracting investors back to India, especially in domestic consumption sectors and companies with little US exposure. And that’s where Indian new age tech companies might see their stronghold. Because India’s push towards manufacturing was low, not many startups moved towards that direction sooner and hence, the risk from tariffs is relatively very low for them as well. And the companies with heavy operations in the country might see investment in the short run, eg, Eternal.   How Will This Play Out? Trade history is full of reminders that tariffs don’t end innovation, they just redirect it. The 1930s Smoot–Hawley Act, often cited as a cautionary tale, slashed global trade volumes by two-thirds within a few years. It didn’t stop manufacturing but it rewired supply chains.  US firms brought production home, European manufacturers reoriented toward colonial markets, and smaller economies sought regional trade blocs to cushion the blow. A more recent example came in 2018–2019, when the US–China tariff tit-for-tat sent electronics makers scurrying to Vietnam, Malaysia and Mexico. Production followed tariff relief, not national loyalty. And once supply chains moved, many didn’t return, even when politics thawed. India’s startups are now standing at a similar junction. The direction of travel is clear: deepen local manufacturing ties, invest in offshore fulfillment hubs to serve tariff-heavy markets, or re-pivot growth towards regions with stable or preferential trade access, ASEAN, the Middle East, Africa, and parts of Europe under FTAs. Deepinder Goyal, cofounder and CEO of Eternal, put it bluntly in a recent tweet: “Every few years, the world reminds us of our place. A threat here, a tariff there. But the message is the same: stay in your lane, India. Global powers will always bully us, unless we take our destiny in our own hands. And the only way to do that is if we collectively decide to become the world's largest, most unapologetic superpower in the world.” Markets Watch: New IPOs, Results And More MapmyIndia’s PAT Zooms: The geotech company’s net profit rose 28% YoY to INR 45.8 Cr in Q1 FY26 while operating revenue rose 20% YoY to INR 121.6 Cr. MapmyIndia is also making an investment of INR 25 Cr in quick commerce unicorn Zepto.  BlackBuck’s Q1 Show: The logistics major reported a profit of INR 33.7 Cr in Q1 FY26, up 17.5% from INR 28.7 Cr in the year-ago quarter. Operating revenue zoomed 56% YoY to INR 143.6 Cr during the quarter under review. Ather’s Surge: The EV major narrowed its net loss by 3% to INR 178.2 Cr in Q1 FY26 from INR 182.9 Cr a year ago. Its operating revenue jumped over 79% to INR 644.6 Cr in the quarter under review from INR 360.5 Cr in Q1 FY25. Early Backers Dump Ola Electric Stakes: Z47 and Tiger Global Management pared down their holdings in the EV giant in Q1 FY26. While the former dumped 0.81% stake for INR 144 Cr, the latter diluted 0.21% shareholding in the company for INR 36.6 Cr  That’s all for this Sunday. See you next week with another edition of Inc42 Markets. Till then, Lokesh Choudhary
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/trumps-tariffs-roadblock-indias-new-age-ipos-inc42-yxdvc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3Bw6%2FK1OCuR1GM9a5RVdjOxg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=2d0GypiaIThHU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me5jnjlz~6f-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me5jnjlz-6f&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWVmYjY4ZWM3ZDA0NzkwYWM4NjYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmUyNTFlYWRlZDI0NWFjZWNhZGFiNWMxYjk2NWM3MjYxZWM4MDJjOTkyN2Q1NDkzZCwxLDE%3D

tickets.subject: ASIF, a new lead is available in Kozhikode

thread.body:
A Social Media Consultant at HGS - Hinduja Global Solutions in Kozhikode is looking for help.

Submit proposal:https://www.linkedin.com/service-marketplace/projects/15201391516?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04%3BzRynJM5WT%2BSAOg4%2Fv8TbNA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=0eyFoh9VhogrU1&ek=email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04&e=bze0lp-me4b1tgg-tw&eid=bze0lp-me4b1tgg-tw&m=hero&ts=submit_proposals&li=0&t=plh  


---------------------------------
          Social Media Consultant @ HGS | Social Media Strategy, Content Creation | ORM
        
          Third Degree Connection
        


---------------------------------

---------------------------------
If you’re interested in working on this project, submit a proposal today.

What happens after you’ve submitted a proposal?
Well share your proposal and LinkedIn profile with the client
The client will review your proposal and reach out if they are interested

In the meantime, if you have any questions or feedback for us, please reach out to us here.https://www.linkedin.com/comm/e/v2?urlhash=_4og&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fhelp%2Flinkedin%2Fask%2FSP-LISPQ&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04%3BzRynJM5WT%2BSAOg4%2Fv8TbNA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=0eyFoh9VhogrU1&trk=eml-email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04-hero-0-contact_us&trkEmail=eml-email_marketplace_provider_new_lead_04-hero-0-contact_us-null-bze0lp~me4b1tgg~tw-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me4b1tgg-tw

­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ 

Make with Notion. Fort Mason San Francisco. September 18 2025. ( https://makewithnotion.com/?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Hi Asif,

Make with Notion, our annual conference, is back—and bigger than ever.

Join us on September 18 in San Francisco for a day of keynotes, demos, and intimate conversations about AI and the tools of tomorrow with the people who shape them.

For a limited time, we're offering a special invitation for like-minded builders: use code MWN25FIFTY to get 50% off your ticket.

Register now ( https://events.notion.com/make-with-notion-25/ga12k9m2f?utm_source=Customer.io&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=mwn_2025&utm_content=ga_email_1&utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

You'll hear UNIQLO Creative Director Clare Waight Keller explain how design is a force for better living; Vercel COO Jeanne DeWitt Grosser share an operator’s perspective on the AI business revolution; and Dwarkesh Patel in conversation with Notion cofounder Simon Last and Anthropic researchers Sholto Douglas and Trenton Bricken; plus much, much more.

Clare Waight Keller ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/clare-waight-keller?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Clare Waight Keller

Creative Director, UNIQLO

Dwarkesh Patel ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/dwarkesh-patel?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Dwarkesh Patel

Host, Dwarkesh Podcast

Alan Kay ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/alan-kay?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Alan Kay

Jeanne DeWitt Grosser ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/jeanne-dewitt-grosser?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Jeanne DeWitt Grosser

Chief Operating Officer, Vercel

Nora Grasham ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/nora-grasham?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Nora Grasham

Senior Director, IT Engineering, Affirm

Sholto Douglas ( https://makewithnotion.com/speakers/sholto-douglas?utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Sholto Douglas

Member of Technical Staff, Anthropic

Seating is limited, so register today to save your spot! Use registration code MWN25FIFTY for a 50% discount on your ticket. The code will expire on August 22.

Register now ( https://events.notion.com/make-with-notion-25/ga12k9m2f?utm_source=Customer.io&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=mwn_2025&utm_content=ga_email_1&utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

See you there!
The Notion Team

P.S. Can’t make it to San Francisco? We've got you covered. Register for the livestream ( https://info.notion.com/MWN-2025-Livestream.html?utm_source=Customer.io&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=mwn_2025&utm_content=ga_email_1&utm_campaign=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send+%5Bl180+active%5D&utm_campaignid=2711&utm_campaigntype=newsletter&utm_content=MWN+25+-+GA+%26+Speaker+Send&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) to enjoy all Stage 1 and Stage 2 sessions, including our keynote with Notion founder Ivan Zhao.

Write, plan, organize.
In one AI-powered workspace.

thread.body:
This is to inform you that your NACH has bounced due to insufficient balance.

As per Negotiable Instruments Act, NACH bounce and overdue loans attract hefty penalties and impact your credit score as well.

We have tried to get in touch with you to understand the reason for default and tentative repayment date but have not got satisfactory response.


Get in touch with us on an urgent basis.

Please deposit pending money ASAP.


Best Regards,

TeamCredFin

Ph: +91-9311226661

tickets.subject: Your CRIF Consumer Credit Score Pulled Out
NACH Bounced

thread.body:
This is to inform you that your NACH has bounced due to insufficient balance.

As per Negotiable Instruments Act, NACH bounce and overdue loans attract hefty penalties and impact your credit score as well.

We have tried to get in touch with you to understand the reason for default and tentative repayment date but have not got satisfactory response.


Get in touch with us on an urgent basis.

Please deposit pending money ASAP.


Best Regards,

TeamCredFin

Ph: +91-9311226661

Book your seat

Set your budget

tickets.subject: Information on how to stay safe from scammers

thread.body:
Let’s #BeatTheCheats together

A public awareness initiative

 <http://lnk.custcomm.icicibank.com/vtrack?clientid=54938&ul=
UgoGUwoBCAFLB0lZQwxUEA5WDQ1RAw8JAwt5AloHC14aAgtYTRhMUg==&ml=VAACXQQCRARLAQIOAFUGHw==&sl=IU5zGWZhRGd6YklUXg4cABNEEAVWX1seXVBQBl4EA1xfTwdaXBgA&pp=0&c=0000&fl=C0ZEFUAIFxtOWUBMRQdXTQVYCUlJXldJWFpKEQ==&ext=bGlzdD1QTDlRZTJKRFBUeWRRQThjSFI5eG9UbHVlOS13RExmQ3VzJnNpPU9PTjRDZFl4YkxkRXY2cG8=>

Fraudsters today carry out cyber frauds that look authentic and create
urgency. These are designed to trick you and wipe out your life
savings!

To help you stay protected, ICICI Bank has launched Beat The Cheats
3.0 – a safe banking awareness initiative, featuring National Award
winning Indian actor Tabu in a dual role. This two-episode series
uncovers how fraudsters feed
on emotions like FEAR and GREED to deceive people through digital
arrest and investment scams.

Awareness is your best defence. Let’s *#BeatTheCheats together.*

thread.body:
Current Careers Opportunities 

By Career For Freshers


By Career For Freshers

    
    
    Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation
Read on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/xerox-offers-various-entry-level-opportunities-career-for-freshers-ccmgc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BHi9aVQ6mQ0%2BoJwfDXj0o9A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=31bGqdTTLFeXU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-bze0lp~me2xdy8o~74-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me2xdy8o-74&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUxYjI4Y2M4ZDM0ODkxYTg4YTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmE3MTRjNmUwZDU0ZWI5ZjNlNWI1ZmNiMjRjNzM0MThhZDQ5OGM3ODJjNGNlNGFjYywxLDE%3D
  
At  Xerox, We are a workplace technology company, building and integrating  software and hardware for enterprises large and small. As customers seek to  manage information across digital and physical platforms,  Xerox delivers a seamless, secure and sustainable experience. Whether inventing the  copier, the ethernet, the laser printer or more, Xerox has long defined the modern work experience. Xerox Careers Opportunities for Graduate Freshers, Entry Level, Mid Level and Experience Professionals in various domain such as Technology, Engineering, Finance, Digital, Operation, Customer services, sales, marketing and many more Career Opportunities Engineering Jobs Xerox scientists and engineers are continuing our legacy of innovation with disruptive technologies in digital transformation, augmented reality, robotic process automation, additive manufacturing, Industrial Internet of Things and clean tech Xerox Opportunities for Graduate Entry Level 2025 Warehouse Associate Xerox Company, is seeking a Warehouse Associate who will be responsible for a wide variety of warehouse activities relating to the receipt, inspection, storage, picking, distribution and basic set up of office equipment, supplies and various goods. This is a full-time opportunity with daytime hours from Monday to Friday. Outside Sales Executive Cypress, CA As a Sales Executive you will be responsible for outside business-to-business (B2B) sales, managing the entire sales cycle, gaining new market share, and growing existing accounts. This is a full-time opportunity selling Xerox Office Technology and Services including hardware, software, apps, information technology (IT), and professional services in an assigned territory. Data Validation, Chandigarh (India) The role of Data Validation Specialist is to ensure that the information is accurately captured in the system generated forms from customer provided documents like Invoices, Claims, Utility documents etc. They are responsible for demonstrating and delivering a high standard of service and data accuracy to our Capture & Content Services customers. This role carries significant responsibilities for data accuracy and plays a pivotal part in driving continuous improvement in the Capture & Content process. For more details information to apply Xerox Graduate Hiring, Click here!
Keep reading on LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/xerox-offers-various-entry-level-opportunities-career-for-freshers-ccmgc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_01%3BHi9aVQ6mQ0%2BoJwfDXj0o9A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFArWM_SCnWaw&midSig=31bGqdTTLFeXU1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_01-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-bze0lp~me2xdy8o~74-null-null&eid=bze0lp-me2xdy8o-74&otpToken=MTUwNzFhZTUxNDI2Y2RjMmI1MjQwNGVkNDMxYWUxYjI4Y2M4ZDM0ODkxYTg4YTYxNzRjMzAzNjY0YjVlNTRmYmY0ZDRkZmE3MTRjNmUwZDU0ZWI5ZjNlNWI1ZmNiMjRjNzM0MThhZDQ5OGM3ODJjNGNlNGFjYywxLDE%3D

tickets.subject: Softr Workflows are here 🚀

thread.body:
🎉 We just shared the news on LinkedIn — show your support and be part of the launch ( https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7386692841063743488 )
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  

Hi ASIF 👋,
-------------

 We’re excited to share that Softr Workflows are now live!

This means Softr is officially full-stack, bringing interfaces, databases, and automations together in one place. Now you can automate everything from simple tasks to advanced, multi-step processes — all natively inside Softr.

✅ Set up automations that connect your Softr apps, Databases, and other tools in your stack, (Airtable, Google Sheets, Slack, Gmail, and more). 

✅ Add conditions, loops, branching logic, and wait times to handle complex workflows.

✅ Trigger actions instantly from buttons inside your Softr apps, and add wait screens to personalize the user experience.

⚙️ Workflows that make your work easier:

*
Update or add records when someone submits a form or completes a task.
* Send emails to confirm new clients, deliverables, or invoices automatically.
* Notify your team on Slack when a deal closes, an invoice needs review, or a project moves stages.
*
Generate AI summaries or replies for feedback, meeting notes, or reports — and send them straight where they’re needed.
* Add calendar events when new tasks or project milestones are created.
* Call APIs to sync data with CRMs, ERPs, or any external tools.
*
Extract PDFs or scrape webpages to capture key info and add it directly to your database.
📌 Every Softr plan (even Free) includes monthly workflow actions, so you can start automating right away. 

Explore Workflows ( https://studio.softr.io/dashboard )Want to see Softr Workflows in action? Check out our launch video ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ONWuRYbO2NQ ). 

Thanks for building with us! 

- Mariam, CEO, Softr

P.S. We’re hosting a live event on Thursday, Oct. 30 at 10AM ET to dive deeper into Softr Workflows and answer your questions. Save your spot here ( https://my.demio.com/ref/PCQUWuayLxaEVs61 ). 

 Build software without devs. Blazingly fast.

Softr Twitter ( https://twitter.com/softr_io )

Softr Platforms GmbH, Rosenthaler Straße 13, 10119 Berlin, Germany

At  Xerox, We are a workplace technology company, building and integrating  software and hardware for enterprises large and small. As customers seek to  manage information across digital and physical platforms,  Xerox delivers a seamless, secure and sustainable experience. Whether inventing the   copier, the ethernet, the laser printer or more, Xerox has long defined the modern work experience. Xerox Careers Opportunities for Graduate Freshers, Entry Level, Mid Level and Experience Professionals in various domain such as Technology, Engineering, Finance, Digital, Operation, Customer services, sales, marketing and many more Xerox scientists and engineers are continuing our legacy of innovation with disruptive technologies in digital transformation, augmented reality, robotic process automation, additive manufacturing, Industrial Internet of Things and clean tech Xerox Opportunities for Graduate Entry Level 2025 Client Sales Associate Xerox is seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Client Sales Support Associate to join our high-performing team. In this critical role, you will support Client Executives by serving as a key liaison between our clients and internal departments—including Managed Services, Enterprise Sales, and Advanced Solutions. You’ll play a central role in enhancing client relationships, identifying technology solutions that align with business operations, and ensuring seamless communication and service delivery. The ideal candidate is a strong communicator, highly organized, and self-motivated, with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. Business Development Representative As a Business Development Representative, you’ll be engaging with clients across various regions. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying and developing new business opportunities within the IT solutions sector. This role requires a proactive approach to sales, excellent communication skills, and a strong understanding of IT products and services Account Executive 2nd Line Technical Analyst Technical Service Desk Analysts will be expected to communicate effectively over our customer chat engagement portal with end users as well as provide excellent over the phone IT Support. The Technical Service Desk Analyst will play a crucial role in contributing and evolving our client’s experience of the overall IT Service, by being the first point of contact for all IT Support related queries. For more details information to Xerox Graduate, Click here!

International Business Machines Corporation is an American multinational technology corporation headquartered in Armonk, New York, with operations in over 171 countries. IBM  Computers and information technology, A career in IBM Consulting embraces long-term relationships, meaningful impact, and close collaboration with clients across the globe. IBM Internship 2025, IBM Careers Opportunities for Graduate Freshers, Entry Level role in various domain such as Technology, Engineering,  AI, Cyber securities,  Artificial Engineering, Robotics, Digital, Marketing, Operation and may more Part of a team, you’ll be surrounded by bright minds and keen co-creators – always willing to help and be helped – as you apply passion to work that will compel our clients to invest in IBM’s products, services, and people. Remote IBM Careers Graduate Entry Level 2025 Developer SOA-Transaccional – Colombia In this role, you’ll work in one of our IBM Consulting Client Innovation Centers (Delivery Centers), where we deliver deep technical and industry expertise to a wide range of public and private sector clients around the world. Our delivery centers offer our clients locally based skills and technical expertise to drive innovation and adoption of new technology. Job Responsibilities You will have the responsibility to carry out the analysis, design, development, tests and development of services and APIs, as well as participating in agile work model meetings. Required education Associate’s Degree/College Diploma Required technical and professional expertise Java, Spring boot, Arquitecturas limpias, patrones de integration, MQ, Apache Kafka, Kubernetes SAP PP Junior Consultant – Brazil System Service Representative – USA Developer SOA Benefits Professional – Malaysia For more details information to apply IBM Graduate Hiring, Click here!

tickets.subject: ET Today's Paper | Your daily newspaper is now ready to read
⏳ 25 or 55, Leadership Has No Deadline

thread.body:
https://click.updates.timespro.com/?qs=a20f08c67ffecc4c04166181f97f7e87cf655991a1a085e5d0e3bd87429a1a35daa912693b5e886a645501dcd2b742dbda3fd19bb73d10b18d166cdd3bc09603 



 “Am I Too Late to Do an MBA?” Here’s the Truth No One Tells You


Dear Aspirant,


If you’ve ever wondered,“Is it too late for me to do an MBA?” - Here’s the truth: It never is.


Some lead at 25. Others soar at 55.

Leadership doesn’t follow a timeline - it follows intent.


At IIM Kozhikode, we’ve seen professionals from diverse backgrounds and life stages unlock new chapters through the Executive Postgraduate Programme in Management (EPGP – Batch 18).

It’s not just a credential - it’s a reset button for those ready to lead with clarity, confidence, and credibility.



💬 What Our Learners Say:

 

“The journey offered a holistic view of working with the best global companies and the smartest minds in business - an experience I’m incredibly grateful for.”

- Sripathi Ramaswamy, Agile Delivery Manager, TCS

 

Whether you’ve hit a career plateau or are simply seeking to sharpen your edge, this is your moment. And no, you're not late.
You're right on time.

tickets.subject: Undeliverable: [Konnect Insights] We received your request — TKT-0029

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

tickets.subject: Undeliverable: [Konnect Insights] We received your request — TKT-0031

thread.body:
[https://products.office.com/en-us/CMSImages/Office365Logo_Orange.png?version=b8d100a9-0a8b-8e6a-88e1-ef488fee0470]
Your message to alerts@axisbank.com couldn't be delivered.
alerts wasn't found at axisbank.com.
asif    Office 365      alerts
Action Required                 Recipient
Unknown To address

How to Fix It
The address may be misspelled or may not exist. Try one or more of the following:

  *   Send the message again following these steps: In Outlook, open this non-delivery report (NDR) and choose Send Again from the Report ribbon. In Outlook on the web, select this NDR, then select the link "To send this message again, click here." Then delete and retype the entire recipient address. If prompted with an Auto-Complete List suggestion don't select it. After typing the complete address, click Send.
  *   Contact the recipient (by phone, for example) to check that the address is correct.
  *   The recipient may have set up email forwarding to an incorrect address. Ask them to check that any forwarding they've set up is working correctly.
  *   Clear the recipient Auto-Complete List in Outlook or Outlook on the web by following the steps in this article: Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.1.1 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=389363>, and then send the message again. Retype the entire recipient address before selecting Send.

Was this helpful? Send feedback to Microsoft<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=618497>.
________________________________

More Info for Email Admins
Status code 554 5.4.14

Typically this error occurs because the recipient email address is incorrect or doesn't exist at the destination domain. This can usually be fixed by the sender. However, sometimes the issue needs to be fixed by the recipient or the recipient's email admin. If the steps in the How to Fix It section above don't fix the problem, and you're the email admin for the recipient, try one or more of the following:

The email address exists and is correct - Confirm that the recipient address exists, is correct, and is accepting messages.

Synchronize your directories - If you have a hybrid environment and are using directory synchronization make sure the recipient's email address is synced correctly in both Office 365 and in your on-premises directory.

Errant forwarding rule - Check for forwarding rules that aren't behaving as expected. A forwarding rule can be configured by an admin via mail flow rules or mailbox forwarding address settings, or by the recipient via the Inbox Rules feature.

Mail flow settings and MX records are not correct - Misconfigured mail flow settings or MX records can cause this error. Check your Office 365 mail flow settings to make sure your domain and any mail flow connectors are set up correctly. Also, work with your domain registrar to make sure the MX records for your domain are configured correctly.

Mail loop detected - This error also indicates that the receiving organization's email settings are misconfigured, creating a mail loop when a message is sent to an address that isn't found in their directory. This usually won't disrupt mail flow for recipients that actually exist, but the recipient's email admin should fix the misconfiguration to reduce the chance of any other mail flow issues. A common cause for this loop is that the recipient's domain is configured as "Internal Relay" when it should be "Authoritative." Another common cause for the loop is that both the sender and recipient are part of the same organization, but the sender's mailbox is hosted by Office 365, while the recipient's mailbox is hosted on-premises, and an outbound connector from Office 365 to the on-premises email servers is missing or misconfigured. To fix this, the recipient's email admin should create a correctly configured outbound connector in Office 365 to route the message to the on-premises mailbox.

For more information and tips to fix this problem, see Fix email delivery issues for error code 5.4.14 in Office 365<https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=397497>.

The Monthly Build - Google Developer Program - June 2026

thread.body:
Google Developer Program<https://c.gle/AOExmq0uWayRCVE_tWbLEtcfV9diXSIgbpWyjhShbtzVeagQZbOfn-0OnN3e3q5CRp7wygYf4daUuOcZVD8W1wBDYcSX8-IyqcgbUcW0dXX5hD1CrFAj4G-UQqF63LezHWubs0VBg3bM9ygmhdXJL1v-6PsPLv5kKR2XmQ>

Written by Richard Seroter<https://c.gle/AOExmq2jwsNL1HhEY4f0yxw2hpZjm2HppxzhT0bkiB7eYcyxRHFlb8f8NJqiJ83jYixH3dJKYl7-WAwekADtaMyhvcK7trEWj9LMHPmohtyjfYKg_Zp5k3LvTjW1k9-9XQSVHqI>

BUILDER SPOTLIGHT:

Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers frontier performance for the agentic era

At Google I/O, we unveiled the Google 3.5 family of models,<https://c.gle/AOExmq3mGokmdwQmPcayBk-vioRoav_83Z2JfgfhvDxAcuKMryG0QcSHh0Dpn1JUE_Jfu7zYnmGkH1Tl7DL4WNRdbO9NBLikGvz91oyvEctT_eqYPUZD9a_nfTrVJrGWAXv-n9Wo8ieyfWp_i6sIMJQktV0Zp-MDUX4> starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash. This model is fast. Like super fast. I’ve been using it extensively and am blown away by how it tackles agentic workflows over multiple days without losing reasoning quality. This is our strongest model yet for agentic workflows. Take advantage of this excellent model in the Gemini app, AI Mode in Search, Google AI Studio, Google Antigravity, Gemini Enterprise, and Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.

Antigravity 2.0, Antigravity CLI, Antigravity IDE, and the Antigravity SDK are here to make agent-first coding better than ever<https://c.gle/AOExmq1QIMrPrVcmOUIFT5qTMmCJIVLq9Z6usUn2psCuWL_bO_sn_bJpiAFaGieBTsMl6A1RPGpMGaSPXvfdxwwmyCSZYEMWgnUID-l6LZfTZr1ThWCeyDaIy3fFwGd7pjMiRdJkVIeXSDtClQQhqpSK_TWoq65CCATv_JzCmoc6idhZUKa0FF6XlzFVjvjCn84U>

Take advantage of the new Google Antigravity ecosystem

Big changes for Google Antigravity! There’s a new standalone desktop Antigravity app<https://c.gle/AOExmq3ILyejVzvQgNDl-EslbWAWARBibWmJZgLCPVkZ4hs_mCsrRRiX7gzFGMTw4UZLYMfxSvRTuYlZ1NnhDK-PJ5wDpcC7dIKlt1diraTOG2zxqWTJ-n3Vl9o4e1xpqcxKVTz8lERMRc-PLYGMJJ4YZsCruM1g4siC5u43yMWCNRq3Cx2SvQTN-dykRA_8ib_znS3HCXkgi7gqDS_REjmd> that supports dynamic sub-agents, async task management and more. Use the new Antigravity CLI<https://c.gle/AOExmq18yUX4ASRfv4Y77EK3fuXsE2ZpHF6dsjJqsoIlcvBJDAe9U7RRm8wSnYM-eX_1vKPsWyRTY4pOqxuVglPBhsRrz7gA7MoC-MnH_08rN1uYAjFNfo6M3cqvOrOVhbGUQyV-d5u4ou8BOLsoLZ8lhsJJFj--lopwmZdEALDS9Tb-sLgXiV2Ojtd1sq-wWA> for an agent-first terminal experience. You can still use the Antigravity IDE<https://c.gle/AOExmq03FyB2VBtPT_1FB_V6KtRyiuzKFoRBkvOvvnV4URw4JGUcMutayHWQZVCCl-RKytHwVH4DYWRZm817CbM1uEDgc8p-BO6opybTekiqpfPoUeOlkSR4YNQInSkp9q8oTZZHTdIY0vivetAajBQMAAmMF9AwIdxGDit0SOlg> to view and edit code, while trying out the Antigravity SDK<https://c.gle/AOExmq1eyTIkV4AcfwrDN8uU66HQ-6Av9MiqqKjHTeFU98Kbk_KYgVe2Zg8tq_SnNvYA8DFJVMlBa-2dee2_QwAtLP2gn5yapEqdBjeWYcKH3wC57gNIHx59weyTm4FYKd8o3Ia_PicD2EigqA8F7EH1-g__ledpdodFz1KfhcyMqjqGHN8B2U3uTxOp4onTNw> to build your own experiences with this coding agent.

Google AI Studio now supports Workspace integrations, vibe coding Android apps, and more.<https://c.gle/AOExmq3lsnUwUofZc512JhRLlI1BlP4ZYHMvBOJ9I67TOcF4o3N8iKcAAW_O8S95dkztLm3twZLysIMkO-ZpM0mABM7UbdOMedrVoX9IFa9bCIWtj7w_6UmfWusyZS07JFJYi1BjjZv0suSYVCFpMkRgnXShIfLyNAp6dWXRchhsP6BwgqWh4g_5AXdzJ5vouD131IOU5Pf9JUMXzlpwLM8f3wxSeyE>

Use Google AI Studio to build Android apps and more.

This surface just keeps getting better. Google Workspace resources are now accessible from the apps you build in Google AI Studio. And pre-register for access to the new mobile app. But the coolest update was the ability to vibe code (and publish!) an Android app directly from Google AI Studio. I tried it myself. Amazing!

Learn more<https://c.gle/AOExmq1mfZvPPGgTFH6H6vR2RqysydC7HW33jbFeMyCkxi4V1qRkeK4hoCksdLtoGVbyq_neun_mOG-AQqFucyaYgEiu29OWgIR4snuL7qoj4Ab_z_5c9ZYtWdV37cnFrroe3uKnRcDOXe6X9JryNfG5KF94lGUeiPIsLmM_0Sp1fF9fDMFkBG8DpkPDifnIduVdyKPFJDzXFnI4VXqBw-I9s1W7>

Autonomous debugging with DevTools MCP<https://c.gle/AOExmq29gWda85PT6l74w40rfH1u_JlweETu6ZSGrD55sed9c_nCq7jwxF2Re0szs7UKGFBVkkNLKMbVCVZPkqD1JmCRayfU2Pntf3WQWLl38mw20crwOAuPysvF1KCD3aivHVQXOvtui6SzNZD191xlH8GeCQqlSJsN>

Do better AI coding with Chrome DevTools for Agents 1.0

Connect your agent to your browser! Use the MCP server, CLI, or agent skills<https://c.gle/AOExmq0X7ueQNL5X5aF-rltDanUgGtOeKvKDmRZ5QoJcq_4OlRCz_9R7RmvjY5zQ5aUA0mHtbJRWtqPUc2_QkgFzcLLIyn9etmwaZ6faZJwG3tCMFe3UYcwOb_pX5IKP3fdIMMds748Lyd3loWezY8kNrZeBXL4w-v0tapTzlwdL9J0JfUUdQ54OI17DRdKBZeFddIPgSGQ> to allow your agent to use your site the way a real user would. These DevTools make it easier to simulate users, debug issues, and even check for SEO issues.

Watch this<https://c.gle/AOExmq0mADhqYCltPmtS_Z5J2dEx-ER9sfv2znOJWPN29Uiip4D5i7ABQX8aaMk24FbM64p4Ak_5Pwg3Fdv6wxCAGrgJm88MnqhOlBlD5EKOgIO4jxo146fhYlpvoMXH8hclaE90LjtUwCFWMhuu5KqqM7Bk>

FAST FIVE

[Android] Android CLI reaches 1.0.

Build for Android using the tool of your choice. Create projects, access Android docs, create and launch virtual devices, deploy Android apps to emulators, and so much more. New in 1.0 is the ability to connect to an Android Studio instance and leverage its capabilities. Read about it here.<https://c.gle/AOExmq3dw3Yzo7I7nJccN02JPgG7fqoYvsHbErrsOmW5z7ybR1gmNz_vFashyqoTh9cPcHT6V57CKaiO6GbwqgXRQlTo57_k7CukFPFkq4f4mPoeehj6o6R5gDyzf6DgsjpY6eUhYSIeVPutaiAjZic3slgD-zsbLQNhG-uO8DWaZWQ7e-Vhv9fgaAenBCHKM7SYDj5wQ572kVCaMzHHnh-nEmFiqO6pAgzhvU1wwg>

[Gemini] Build and run agents in a secure sandbox with Managed Agents.

Define an agent with instructions, tools, and context with a single command, instantiate the agent in a Google sandbox. Managed Agents<https://c.gle/AOExmq3oPhOgvSGtxC4BvXtnBUSnb_E4rkwx1_oWMq-Uiv8cDWdcXtuknRuzlkmLarKEa-809nSXfBguIGggz3-rpsaHtDiK8XcOP_lO43wrkzdWU2b08IFnlDRKQ6Ac8xWVsklrt_SYLWQadd0X6o0r9hrdwzJk8XCVhXaAsBVse8HVraLkNiruwAqpPe9R1mRnYVbIBsCt4RnzH-XEA3vz7o-5TUsLkjM> are powered by the Antigravity agent and takes the complexity out of constructing and running agents yourself.

[Go] Official pkg.go.dev API released.

You all have asked for programmatic access to this resource for Go package documentation and discovery. Now you have it. This new service interface lets you query metadata about any published Go modules. It’s got some valuable endpoints and you can learn more about it here.<https://c.gle/AOExmq1WFfK9sw3PnLSd38mOePcSMKwdhXrzlL0Bln5puOu7ENBYZ4in8Vv_sIIXU_CXR22iAn4zS9x8P2X3hpf4Z3sN1_rZiBBojNInqU9L3ZUXR9G4r0FgFTPmPojQIP6kz7zdc1LvMZ2twEa1tRaV2OE>

[Cloud] Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform adds agent revisions, Skills Registry, more.

Google Cloud users get to have all the fun too. The Managed Agents are available in Agent Platform.<https://c.gle/AOExmq00xNxgYbp2Ru_kmJLIcVg4xceORNbwC0wTZkHUM_eqCUey0SsQWtLb85RT-mBPmTIOeyh5MazDfbo6BT948X-Q71WmLnd4entZSH92gQaAOmz470Vt2qS0R5t64WIKLbIfHW5ZlnYLKXhx9t_PKGMncG-wIm1vNI_DkDiSwXKnIgBKjavG4NV_vOR7XLsYhnV2qYE0g-Ch70Y5CTv07Z1lpznqwTMa9c7IIwS2JDrQYz4w9RsMN6Y> We’ve also brought Google Antigravity to Cloud customers<https://c.gle/AOExmq3_3n-jzTEdNOr7yt6l51uskjDbG_zkI8UH-1XpvmFkAyXjvK_Xa4UdJDyXIog_PBPmPyF3Rvkapzzbap16PS5RApUjQsMdHwV1l7fAdWnjm91gdnRC9t2WJhKeeVfNpaZk-uHzLO53Hu5l4nRowcTr4twwTNY6SJmRkNseTMPho1YKEfRGpvWWEhZRJ1uJwvdeNyFkyjcBgByiaSljo0w6obERngHo> and enterprise terms of service. Agent Platform also now supports agent versioning and traffic splitting.<https://c.gle/AOExmq0bIWI0HAiu9INcFlUup5Mj3DP5r6t-5drdImxDD44sWAkbmqbRSDaIRiUVZVwhwyrwwOOqFnuSS464MV7mi5frNCeJILvXWPIjrc_3h9tmjcCn7cCfoeCYMaVfPz81Hq4DIbQ9MJ5c_NRJVUVz3N6R7ZeQ5HBbrX50qa2EETSPOLHdcL_8P3Ob8byqSwU1glbv3_F1RL1aSERXCs-l6rG7TrvPjRPennSuoIa38QHgcshASKikHxh15ahXaUhGuht6q6V9PDVJ> And the new Skills Registry<https://c.gle/AOExmq14FbLIa2wXAzHlAW9dWRG75y5E6QwgdW2m1Dt23oyf3anUqz3a5HE9vUoZ5IJDdawaKbknLeh8Cy0Z7U5rrjQjGYpKfVxateZ7nde9vARHjz_qzOKd60KSirm48nlU8DYvTiEjBRZWxoeuW8zaqLTG3sh0LjnvpQkQ74DHcgkqky4ZkjnJrsFgLWDnOFjVTz_OiojalTfGSFg0Zp1c> gives you a central way to discover and manage agent skills.

[Flutter] Flutter 3.44, A2UI updates, and agent skills.

Flutter momentum is off the charts. With over 1.5 million monthly users and 1,700 open source contributors, Flutter is everywhere, everyday, built by everyone, for everyone. Check out this monster post of everything new in Flutter,<https://c.gle/AOExmq3mH871l4rjVoDkUGe5aq5O1FzEMLZySD04BZq_sV7plRrPgXgvcf42oasJVwCorkT8YyKA8nJwoPh_5srwJw10dzoBu8k4mXYoMB_pPu7oME8Yt1ved2nEnulWxg5HVLB6VdiK8Rhow9Y8ryLxzte8tm5iGm4WwDy27VoXEGpSxZm5GZmpkbxFdUntt3E4-Z4l> learn about a smart update to our generative UI package,<https://c.gle/AOExmq2zpozg4BsNIQvRrXlXaIftTFRNxEeYqmb8XxmRHYSYIdtkdKd0K38g2kq2OVkmElhrJEUzJE0zQu6w_-CxxJkHJDSQIbVVZoAFZxJlr5cSHh2pW3zuMvbhP_ZfAcq0D4dBZbuyW5u7J199WHAtdv8XgGAuSDevuGri6N2UQNXn1e1mBw-QZcflAXgWNUET99QKHdQw5OqiNHJ-fYJttr77K4YK> and check out agent skills for Dart and Flutter.<https://c.gle/AOExmq22BiWrX0JMe1hSiPumhsK-DpEkrQuEJZXiG3vWb9hYXwrvA7Hydc6AkJCgIFnPHjsZPUTphDsCuXP88OIS69G8ZcJLL_UgCj9HZZyhDHsaeA5i9imCPfWzOAbhnmWpBzGoDUDnV4ZCvDnXsdH8JmbpMsn0SuA_h3B5nlDSWYwFVzJ8rnIud_X82dyS3_XpIjDuQwqiXMScT9zrifumZvq93knLpDE> And don’t miss Dart 3.12<https://c.gle/AOExmq3Y9cDJ6tQ37IRNrlE-Owey4yqEBWxiuSTZHw0ORRTU-dohv0sxeR_t7yHyE2V5Jn_qshmG0YPsbwS8-rirrevBhozSd6qY5rJM4R3L_O1D8VSKCDusQ0Vc2rcSOFT-OC0fc4F1vwPvLUknlRIX4g> for some sneaky-good language and experience updates.

LEVEL UP WITH LEARNING

Catch up Google I/O highlights

We shared over 100 updates<https://c.gle/AOExmq10Tv1CntPsolJZSqxw2A9Re-2Ls_-LkfMjObiuwK-nqhh9IKrSxVNeUqIs-YCU_mlmXLEs7-HztesT2l4sMk1CqlAY5URLJYU_M5hzR72YN9KEt7B8DbfHPf6IwcN9d-nm1s8mcOBzOaxAXEsUQ9R7Ho4xxVXxkM7yVGX5SCG0OD-bI51uu85DL5qBHAPmk-CyHNjfXtAQoT_InHyCeEJZigPqBcRdiFsh> at Google I/O, but it’s ok if you didn’t catch them all. I’m paid to, and still missed a few. Revisit the high points by watching this recap.

Watch now<https://c.gle/AOExmq2k4ijdQITjMMupgyCHHiDzIH1jJydCP-790ujN08xAA7Rzcd_IBdII9EFQHvOFXhw7R8EschKTXNx7U9a39ghIg5g0YZRRULurFTmvMKnp07b3uMLBgs2fpCOH5DfQQ7dc-fvFDnV0DMz4JilSAp5-LpUK4XwQ_1-KQIBUhn64bY4pk_ZP6Ij16oNQ7If0tBqXU-SR0g_ap155YeR76AHaXsa3ldbp6lpCGsSBLdY59AACeyfU8rFcBcCM76Y>

Take care of your Gemini and Google API keys

It’s important to learn the right ways to manage your API keys. The result of a hijacked key can be catastrophic, and we should follow these steps to reduce the risk.

Read now<https://c.gle/AOExmq1RfoBIxtQu9GKDqEARhWP5mruFRoyu6zPnsN0CTiGlVTfwm9i_q-4xP-lJTdx22I0VldqKlnF1Lj34Hrl9KRxUbOw0-fbLhpjOFUetlmGFWybU25g6C9ODmvsl9mEAVBXaG1owf7obI9AF6n3XHgJ0uVvNCdaOy8La7iqPHy1I7JcIjB-Nu09V_H82Q0rIfeFIKj3Q5Jo0jH9W>

DEVELOPER COMMUNITY

Configuring MCP Servers and Skills for Antigravity CLI and IDE

Our agentic tools are better when you apply agent skills and attach MCP servers. Darren dug right into the new Google Antigravity experiences to learn how to make this happen.

Read the article<https://c.gle/AOExmq3XfLxzTZXRkIpeRe8nRcaoydgJ6vWfGNdWmGqEsaj0qlKK37xVXbp_bQPZphaIbkO8W4c4eitj5qiYEzk9MxhsbAAaj8XV5SZsY3suHt1WiVnetyqSFGvGDrWaL9qZl8-_YI3F3Umjgzc5ANo48sBQnoO7IfhOLHKl-Mnp8HGBEL9eOzkrnXsNoPaIUN82qesh8EdoAj7O9DoQsFbqlrBHO7eTgYgwlN99n-IFyK3wPbxbmmvs>

Complete guide to Gemini Embedding 2

I’m impressed! Pedro and Fabricio built a Colab notebook that lets you fully explore Google’s first natively multimodal embedding model. See what it means to take any sort of digital input and map to the same vector space.

Open the notebook<https://c.gle/AOExmq3fn06SGhSysjW5iaa3UiUB7JALyYlTdaFSgKg7Vy_BX1y9pENvYXvz7vBBEuRYxO7fiQbdpFcHYjFrdPQ74WIC3Ipme6w7s5ZqS-y6V5JUYH67WnVqYRGtQAz4PIu7H07_pN0h6urJI90-GPE8DSCN_lidRfCpIN37DR2yA4_xc5EI8zGllRVOwYudxlE7aaKYj0oPMOYRkgR4Sr4CX51LHCfBXYsabTrRiN4qFHxV61bUdNPh>

Connect with us

Web<https://c.gle/AOExmq0rKIqVnzKJR0LWoh_rt5ccPclGCNiA4jkoviPPmqEYvIByfd9aFiwHtD3nShNexMyTt-scTUmhDWtHkRtW7a2mTA-sL2yhdK2Jvmv1mdBawGJcNOmIIrIVigQYQT020UVSIXgb>

X<https://c.gle/AOExmq3hEveNYwaeyQA0_WyU4_0NOH6JBLHwH6BxUoAg8i6c4I4RB2uG0v04RX2h7m7sCPp347NQmxhq-Jp0DRQrc8LnWkniknqSL5TzAT_4ESsINHT_kuZP>

linkedIn<https://c.gle/AOExmq22Oc-yDgKrUIaG56e6BxRpv9DUXnn5hvVLGZGhxnRkcvyeGxgRC2VRvTShd3Z_P6Z39xxgU8-88S370JWWM6NBL7AbqwYicFkGA2V9JP1XoEaKrdKw1vl8Z4vAXfVnhkrdGiG2YmYmX63kHT5Hg6ujVFsqLSyR674U1pteWzJUySzIBqQpnWOddDjm>

Youtube<https://c.gle/AOExmq20WqnjHvKzSF79AJU3kRq-sFYSRjvx7bPe5UyVMH0sWVUFNNzyO_zH-AL5YCttF73V4ALPvBjFtVYB4KaxiPcXg4pSrpHi28wMcDbPHw_BjNcw_RyNydWkpw03_lCqWCERq1ovS9w_C8QNrh4>

A few months ago, my son was learning to walk.

Today, cancer has spread from his ankle to his face and inside his mouth.

He is only 1 year and 8 months old.

Some days, he refuses food because eating hurts too much. Other days, he cries
in pain until he falls asleep from exhaustion.

Doctors say he urgently needs chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and radiation
treatment costing ₹7,50,000.

I lost my job while caring for him. We have spent everything we had, and there
are days when we struggle to afford food ourselves.

I don't know how to save my son anymore.

Please help me continue his treatment.


Help Him Fight Cancer

A few months ago, my son was learning to walk.

Today, cancer has spread from his ankle to his face and inside his mouth.

He is only 1 year and 8 months old.

Some days, he refuses food because eating hurts too much. Other days, he cries
in pain until he falls asleep from exhaustion.

Doctors say he urgently needs chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and radiation
treatment costing ₹7,50,000.

I lost my job while caring for him. We have spent everything we had, and there
are days when we struggle to afford food ourselves.

I don't know how to save my son anymore.

Please help me continue his treatment.

tickets.subject: You've successfully purchased resolvogroup.com

thread.body:
From: "The Google Workspace Team" [workspace-noreply@google.com]
Subject:  You've successfully purchased resolvogroup.com

Domain purchased

## You've successfully purchased resolvogroup.com

Start using resolvogroup.com for your business now.

### Your Domain Registration account

**Username: **

contact@resolvogroup.com

**Domain: **

resolvogroup.com

You're the administrator. To manage all your Domain Registration services, billing, and users, Sign in to the Admin Console (https://admin.google.com?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email).

** **

Your new domain is registered with Squarespace Domains. For advanced domain settings Sign in to the Squarespace Domains (http://login.squarespace.com) using your contact@resolvogroup.com account.

### Avoid Domain Suspension
Squarespace sent an email to verify the contact information for your new domain (https://support.squarespace.com/hc/en-us/articles/205812218-Verifying-your-Squarespace-managed-domain). This verification is required by ICANN (the governing body for domain registrations) (https://www.icann.org/resources/pages/contact-verification-2013-05-03-en). The confirmation message was sent to the email address you used to sign up for Google Workspace.

If you don't confirm your contact information within 15 days of purchase, Squarespace is required to suspend your domain. Gmail can't send and receive email for a suspended domain.



### Need help?

24/7 support is included with your Domain Registration subscription.

**For Google Workspace: ** Contact the Google Workspace support team (https://support.google.com/a/answer/1047213?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email) or visit the Google Workspace Administrator Help Center (https://support.google.com/a?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email).

**For Cloud Identity Premium: **Contact the Cloud Identity support team (https://support.google.com/cloudidentity/answer/7664425/?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email) or visit the Cloud Identity Help Center (https://support.google.com/cloudidentity?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email). Also, set up email with your domain (https://support.google.com/cloudidentity/answer/7667994?utm_source=14644305&utm_medium=email) to create custom email addresses at resolvogroup.com.

**For Squarespace Domains: ** Visit the Squarespace Domains Help Center (https://support.squarespace.com/hc/en-us/categories/200290497).

Sincerely,

The Google Workspace Team


(C) 2026  Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043  *  Google Cloud EMEA Ltd., 70 Sir John Rogersons Quay, Dublin 2, Ireland.

You're receiving this mandatory email service announcement to update you about important changes to your Google Workspace product or account.

thread.body:
Google Workspace <https://c.gle/AOExmq0LQtxssklxOO0galWFw4ZtBKI2Ed5x0jQaM27TFZ8TLPB3Ifq1gJynI9Kpclw6DnFTvbh5oMyqtzMjzSOc6jztMQSmXGgo75jYCR6mRX7pI0hIi2cofn7WNUh0ffya0miDzAgx>

Welcome to your Google Workspace free trial

Check out these resources to get the most out of your new productivity and collaboration tools.

Start setup <https://c.gle/AOExmq3XcVrzT6PnAxvz2AYdFK2xtbkBHWeTctp71itNC6vnOW2fkmslKv6bwLzKQHU0R0_PLEYR0r_TszQ5fznhQhzE2qetYCN3E6ynDsJ1CEPsPRsKgDCdN3fsIlHbblFQryfUhGpsHLg90czjFi3_VG9ftwn6bihjtzrLfGU0YuCHWajAGBA>

Get Admin console support <https://c.gle/AOExmq1AcaIDo6sZb5XVi176Ar4t_WUnADBNxtzNcY8kxMykICVMD2FmJIAvH14Dwb6j3_ilqux-gZTs4remHwAjzQO2MnPoJ0KKeWX3EefAHSlNQ6LvAXoHp3HSmecofg6f7aDHzGPE5EDVab5kIY8rhwY1v0lH8PUISzfvrG4hqwUWxg>

Complete your setup and tour

A team collaborates in an office while viewing charts, files, and comments in Google Workspace. <https://c.gle/AOExmq2KS2MDdC9wb7PSHfq1kNQ4biMV9xVn5qbv-uQGzge9O710uNhzD9NSpgrM3RRrBtGgTxkv-yEUdqQPb-82wFhIZZvRu04QWf_9sDt9gFKF4pdyf12LLI80WHSFnVSJ>

Hi there,

It’s time to get familiar with Google Workspace. Use this info to help get the most out of your free trial:

- Take steps to get started with Gmail
  To ensure you can start using your new professional email in Gmail, verify your domain <https://c.gle/AOExmq1pqHp-HLC5no3N6QeXE68yv7sheBhx_nCV_RM3J8Nf61s2EJCRZs-71IhpqjunIqhYO7Fjqcub3Z2KlASzglGYrgAiaE6xdwacK-wC5KDdR81dW81EIqBTPWQvR8oYJE5tFXn-NrRZ8cXoqw09qFtwhttk>. Once you finish setting up your domain, be sure to set up your mail exchange records <https://c.gle/AOExmq0tU_ArXiiS9r4SPI3Lt0Nba3SzkbZIEB-25LLJjEDywvPf2gkPRli4CkQPHLbqvG0vBjrffz7eSdrK_TcGZgswUQ5PH63VraUM2U_QLVy0ASS2Utm-bDU68b0iYqT4KgCWLHOFl1A1BbNoR4JYBYMz6m6yI-OVprv3>. If you purchased your domain when signing up, your Gmail is ready to use.


- Read through your quick start guide

  Now that you’ve decided on your edition, set up Google Workspace for your organization.
