tickets.subject: New privacy settings for Search services

thread.body:
Google logo
 

Wahidshaikh1966@gmail.com
 

Hello Wahid,

We're updating our settings to give you even more control over saved history and personalised recommendations across Google Search services, including Search, Maps, Shopping, Hotels, Flights, Translate and News. You'll see this change in your Google Account in the next few days.

What's changing

Previously, saving history and personalisation were managed by Web & App Activity. Going forwards, we're introducing two new settings to help you better tailor your experience: Search services history and Personalised Recommendations. These settings let you revisit your past searches and decide if you want your experience to be personalised. You can turn these settings on or off at any time. As people increasingly search in new ways, like searching a photo with Lens, Search services history now includes media from your interactions, which you can stop saving at any time.

How this affects your account

New history and personalisation settings: These new settings will reflect your most recent choices for Web & App Activity and Search personalisation settings. If these are currently on, these new settings will stay on. If they're off, the new settings will be off. After the transition, Web & App Activity and Search services settings will be separate, and changes to one won't affect the other.

Auto-delete: Your prior choice from Web & App Activity for how long your history is saved will also apply to Search services history. As always, you can change how long history is saved, choose an auto-delete period and review or delete history manually at any time.

Your media is saved when Search services history is on: Saved media includes your images, files, audio and video from your interactions with Search services to help improve your experience. For example, this lets you revisit your past visual searches with Lens or continue a Search Live conversation about a song that you heard. To support these types of interactive product experiences, Google will now save your media to your Search services history, applying robust privacy and security protections. Like your Search services history, your saved media is also used to develop and improve Google services and technologies, including AI models and safety measures. With this transition, if your Web & App Activity setting is currently turned on, this new Save media subsetting will also be turned on along with your Search services history. You can turn off your <https://c.gle/AOPyDKQ46UB9NbX18kK5VEkTKzHLn1yisxCl-B4gJepBzBa3FugWF9fxZggpdzxWwUqcr0mbm3DMR86aXFUPHP_X92xIZMJIwmB5-WrbNO2sZehGWEpKO65yXKLaE58FMOYXGUT0c0QBc_v8S7FclY0WeD91dzf8e0n7dS8K-Q15U98Xm3bgbBLbD0xotpI00nAnlpPGzK_mR4TXF_In6bCTSlUglJUSKgKPsdN756z12lcmMM5QkPvRCXbpYpwPFN3nLqZ1i1JsZhV2WoGm0BgiTLMtJ9T_-rKzdU8HK3-iUODR_DdN07eN-CXvYD6MGvkqC2g12BX7YiYtC3wjf_X7PwTT3Z6xNbwJjxlDy6vy7adA-2iFXuZyK_np5lMD3Q>Save media subsetting at any time, and you can also delete individual pieces of media from your history.

https://cto.new


 

 
It's been a busy month! Here are some highlights:
 
 * We gave away over $100,000 worth of AI usage for free!

 * The cto CLI went live

 * Thousands of AI Businesses created

 * $100s being made on the marketplace by our top sellers

 * More new models, including Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and DeepSeek V4

 
Read the full changelog: https://docs.cto.new/changelog [https://docs.cto.new/changelog]


 


AI business boom

 
Thousands of AI business have been created with cto in the last month and we've been making loads of improvements to keep up.
 
We've shipped a better business planner, easier task management, a revamped headquarters, and lots more.
 

https://cto.new/agent-teams


 


Marketplace success

 
Our top marketplace sellers are making $100s a month selling AI businesses they built on cto.
 
We also have a growing selection of free marketplace [https://cto.new/business/marketplace] templates. Try them out if you're not
sure what to build!


 


cto CLI

 
The cto CLI [https://cto.new/cli] is live!
 
You can currently get up to $50 of free AI usage per month. Try it out and let us know what you think!
 


 

Don't forget to join the discussion and get help on Discord [https://discord.gg/cto].


 

Keep building! [https://cto.new]
 
Simon and the team at cto [https://cto.new]
 
You are receiving this email because you opted in to receive email from the list Newsletters from Engine Labs
Engine Labs, 2215 Chestnut Street, San Francisco, CA 94123

tickets.subject: YouTube Music subscription suspended due to payment issue

thread.body:
Google Play


Your subscription will be cancelled


UPDATE PAYMENT


Hi ASIF,
Your payment from UPI: Paytm was declined.

Update your payment method to get all of the benefits provided by YouTube Music Premium (YouTube Music) back. These benefits include the following:

Ad-free music videos
Music offline and in the background
To keep these benefits, you'll need to keep your subscription active. Update your payment method or use a different one.
In the meantime, we'll try to process the payment again so you can regain access to your subscription. Manage your subscriptions


SUMMARY



Amount Due ₹119.00


UPDATE PAYMENT


Learn more


Thanks,
The Google Play team


See your Google Play Order History.
View the Google Play Refund Policy and the Terms of Service.




Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland

tickets.subject: 🧠 Your AI digest from Product Hunt

thread.body:
Hello there!

Welcome to Deeper Learning, a newsletter all about innovations in AI from the people on the front lines of new tech (that’s us, the [Product Hunt](https://producthunt.com/) team).

On Tuesday, you’ll receive your first digest. Here’s what you can expect:

📱 AI products: The most interesting, useful, and buzziest apps and tools

🗞The AI headlines you’ll want to discuss with your friends

🤯  Stories, trends, and discoveries that will make you go “woah!”

**A few pointers to enhance your experience:**

* **Gmail users**: Ensure our emails land straight into your primary inbox. On mobile, hit the 3 dots at the top right corner, select "Move to" then "Primary". On desktop, simply drag and drop our email into the "Primary" tab.

* **Apple Mail users**: Tap our email address at the top and select “Add to VIPs”.

* For all other email platforms, follow these instructions.

Can’t wait? Check out our most recent issue of Deeper Learning [here](https://deeperlearning.beehiiv.com/). 

We’re excited to go deeper with you! 🧠

[Aaron](https://www.producthunt.com/@aaronoleary), [Sarah](https://twitter.com/sarmariewright), & the Product Hunt team
